---

```{r, setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  results = "hide",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width = "100%"
)

options(width = 80)
```

# Env
```{r envs}
rm(list = ls())
setwd("/Users/liqun/Desktop/scMutrace-tutorial/ReproducibilityAnalysis/Figure4/")
```

# Load libraries
```{r loadLibs}
library(FSA)
library(ineq)
library(grid)
library(vegan)
library(ArchR)
library(dplyr)
library(GO.db)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggpmisc)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(circlize)
library(pheatmap)
library(corrplot)
library(bedtoolsr)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
library(data.table)
library(UpSetR)
library(ggsankey)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(networkD3)
library(htmlwidgets)
```

# define functions
```{r defineFunctions}
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b, na.rm = TRUE) {
  a <- as.numeric(a)
  b <- as.numeric(b)
  
  if (na.rm) {
    keep <- !(is.na(a) | is.na(b))
    a <- a[keep]
    b <- b[keep]
  }
  
  denom <- sqrt(sum(a^2)) * sqrt(sum(b^2))
  if (denom == 0) return(as.numeric(NA)) 
  
  sim <- sum(a * b) / denom
  
  sim <- max(min(sim, 1), -1)
  
  return(as.numeric(sim))
}

retriveCellsByLocation <- function(CSM, locList){
  CSM$CellTag <- rownames(CSM)
  CSM_tmp <- CSM[, c("CellTag",locList)]
  data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp <- data.frame(
    CellTag = rownames(CSM_tmp),
    MutNum = rowSums(CSM_tmp == "Mut"),
    WTNum = rowSums(CSM_tmp == "WT")
  )
  cells_Total <- data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[rowSums(data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[,c("MutNum", "WTNum")]) > 0, ]$CellTag
  cells_WT <-    data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[,"WTNum"] > 0,]$CellTag
  cells_Mut <-   data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[data_MutPerCell_CSM_tmp[,"MutNum"] > 0,]$CellTag
  cells <- list(Total = cells_Total, Mut = cells_Mut, WT = cells_WT)
  return(cells)
}

retriveLocsByCells <- function(CSM, cellList){
  CSM$CellTag <- rownames(CSM)
  CSM_tmp <- CSM[CSM$CellTag %in% cellList,]
  data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp <- data.frame(
    Location = colnames(CSM_tmp),
    CellMutNum = colSums(CSM_tmp == "Mut"),
    CellWTNum = colSums(CSM_tmp == "WT")
  )
  pos_Total <- data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[rowSums(data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[, c("CellMutNum", "CellWTNum")]) > 0,]$Location
  pos_Mut <- data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[, "CellMutNum"] > 0 ,]$Location
  pos_WT <- data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[data_CellPerMut_CSM_tmp[, "CellWTNum"] > 0 ,]$Location
  pos <- list(Total = pos_Total, Mut = pos_Mut, WT = pos_WT)
  return(pos)
}

get_mut_cols <- function(df, loc) {
  row <- df[df$Location == loc, ]       
  mut_cols <- names(row)[row == "Mut"] 
  mut_cols[mut_cols != "Location"]     
}
```

*AML_census.rds* and *AML_tiergenes.txt* were downloaded from the COSMIC database and curated for downstream analyses

*AML_SSM.rds* and *AML_ATA_CSM_list.rds*, *AML_RNA_CSM_list.rds* were generated using scMutrace as described in the Methods section and `0_pipelineFunctions.Rmd`(pipelines for generating single-cell somatic mutation data list).

*AML_scRNA_meta.rds* and *AML_scATA_meta.rds* contain meta data for cell type annotation similarity analysis and were generate from `0_pipelineFunctions.Rmd`(pipelines for porcessing scRNA-seq data and pipelines for processing scATAC-seq data).

*sampleInfo.txt* contains sample information including cell numbers and patient clinical data for scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq data and was downloaded from original paper.

*EGA_scATA.hg38_multianno.txt* and *EGA_scRNA.hg38_multianno.txt* contain mutation annotation information generated using ANNOVAR.

*Mutational_Matrix_SBS.txt* and *COSMIC_SBS96_Activities.txt* were generated using SigProfiler suite as described in the Methods section.


# load data
```{r loadData}
# load AML census data
AML_census <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_census.rds")
AML_genes_tiers <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_tiergenes.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

# load SSM data
AML_SSM <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_SSM.rds")
AML_SSM_scRNA <- AML_SSM$scRNA
AML_SSM_scATA <- AML_SSM$scATA

# CSM
AML_ATA_CSM_list <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_ATA_CSM_list.rds")
AML_RNA_CSM_list <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_RNA_CSM_list.rds")

# meta data for celltype annotation similarity
AML_scRNA_meta_list <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_scRNA_meta.rds")
# metaQun
AML_scATA_meta_list <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_scATA_meta.rds")

AML_scRNA_meta <- do.call(rbind, AML_scRNA_meta_list)
rownames(AML_scRNA_meta) <- sub("\\.", "#", rownames(AML_scRNA_meta))

AML_scATA_meta <- do.call(rbind, AML_scATA_meta_list)
AML_scATA_meta$SampleID <- sub("_.*", "", AML_scATA_meta$Sample)

rownames(AML_scATA_meta) <- sub("^AML[0-9]+\\.", "", rownames(AML_scATA_meta))

cellTypes <- unique(union(AML_scRNA_meta$Classified_Celltype, AML_scATA_meta$predictedGroup_Un))

# extract mutations and get bed format with census tag
AML_SSM_scRNA_bed <- separate(AML_SSM_scRNA, Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE)[,1:5]
AML_SSM_scRNA_bed$end <- AML_SSM_scRNA_bed$pos
AML_SSM_scRNA_bed <- AML_SSM_scRNA_bed[,c("chr", "pos", "end", "ref", "alt", "Location")]
AML_SSM_scRNA_bed$Tag <- ifelse(AML_SSM_scRNA_bed$Location %in% AML_census$mutation$Location, "Census", "NotCensus")
AML_scRNA_NotCensus_locs <- AML_SSM_scRNA_bed %>% dplyr::filter(Tag == "NotCensus") %>% pull(Location)

AML_SSM_scATA_bed <- separate(AML_SSM_scATA, Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE)[,1:5]
AML_SSM_scATA_bed$end <- AML_SSM_scATA_bed$pos
AML_SSM_scATA_bed <- AML_SSM_scATA_bed[,c("chr", "pos", "end", "ref", "alt", "Location")]
AML_SSM_scATA_bed$Tag <- ifelse(AML_SSM_scATA_bed$Location %in% AML_census$mutation$Location, "Census", "NotCensus")
AML_scATA_NotCensus_locs <- AML_SSM_scATA_bed %>% dplyr::filter(Tag == "NotCensus") %>% pull(Location)

# load paired sample info data
AML_sampleInfo <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/sampleInfo.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
AML_sampleInfo[is.na(AML_sampleInfo)] <- 0

# AML ann
AML_scATA_ann <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/EGA_scATA.hg38_multianno.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
AML_scRNA_ann <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/EGA_scRNA.hg38_multianno.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

col_freq_databases <- c("gnomad40_exome_AF", "gnomad40_exome_AF_raw", "gnomad40_exome_AF_XX", 
                        "gnomad40_exome_AF_XY", "gnomad40_exome_AF_grpmax", "gnomad40_exome_faf95", 
                        "gnomad40_exome_faf99", "gnomad40_exome_fafmax_faf95_max", "gnomad40_exome_fafmax_faf99_max", 
                        "gnomad40_exome_AF_afr", "gnomad40_exome_AF_amr", "gnomad40_exome_AF_asj", 
                        "gnomad40_exome_AF_eas", "gnomad40_exome_AF_fin", "gnomad40_exome_AF_mid", 
                        "gnomad40_exome_AF_nfe", "gnomad40_exome_AF_remaining", "gnomad40_exome_AF_sas", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF", "gnomad40_genome_AF_raw", "gnomad40_genome_AF_XX", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF_XY", "gnomad40_genome_AF_grpmax", "gnomad40_genome_faf95", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_faf99", "gnomad40_genome_fafmax_faf95_max", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_fafmax_faf99_max", "gnomad40_genome_AF_afr",
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF_ami", "gnomad40_genome_AF_amr", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF_asj", "gnomad40_genome_AF_eas", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF_fin", "gnomad40_genome_AF_mid", 
                        "gnomad40_genome_AF_nfe", "gnomad40_genome_AF_remaining", "gnomad40_genome_AF_sas")

col_freq_databases %in% colnames(AML_scATA_ann)
col_freq_databases %in% colnames(AML_scRNA_ann)

AML_scATA_ann <- AML_scATA_ann %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(col_freq_databases), 
                ~ as.numeric(replace(., . == ".", 0))))

AML_scRNA_ann <- AML_scRNA_ann %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(col_freq_databases), 
                ~ as.numeric(replace(., . == ".", 0))))

# Annotate bed census and nonCensus
# scATA
AML_SSM_scATA_bed <- AML_SSM_scATA_bed %>%
  left_join(
    AML_scATA_ann %>%
      dplyr::select(Location, all_of(col_freq_databases)),
    by = "Location"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    freq = if_else(
      if_any(all_of(col_freq_databases), ~ . > 0.0001),
      "high", "rare"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(names(AML_SSM_scATA_bed), freq)

# scRNA
AML_SSM_scRNA_bed <- AML_SSM_scRNA_bed %>%
  left_join(
    AML_scRNA_ann %>%
      dplyr::select(Location, all_of(col_freq_databases)),
    by = "Location"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    freq = if_else(
      if_any(all_of(col_freq_databases), ~ . > 0.0001),
      "high", "rare"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(names(AML_SSM_scRNA_bed), freq)

# load mutation features data
# generate using sigProfiler suite
AML_mutation_features <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/Mutational_Matrix_SBS.txt", header = T, sep = "\t", row.names = 1)
AML_mutation_features_contribution <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/COSMIC_SBS96_Activities.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
```

# extract different stage patient mutations
```{r extractStageMutations}
AML_patient_ATA_mutations <- list()
AML_patient_RNA_mutations <- list()
Stages <- c("DX", "REM", "REL")
for (stage in Stages){
  colnames_stage <- grep(paste0("_", stage, "$"), colnames(AML_SSM_scATA), value = TRUE)
  samples_stage_loc <- AML_SSM_scATA %>%
    dplyr::select(Location, colnames_stage) %>%
    dplyr::filter(if_any(all_of(colnames_stage), ~ . == "Mut")) %>%
    dplyr::pull(Location)
  AML_patient_ATA_mutations[[stage]] <- samples_stage_loc
}

for (stage in Stages){
  colnames_stage <- grep(paste0("_", stage, "$"), colnames(AML_SSM_scRNA), value = TRUE)
  samples_stage_loc <- AML_SSM_scRNA %>%
    dplyr::select(Location, colnames_stage) %>%
    dplyr::filter(if_any(all_of(colnames_stage), ~ . == "Mut")) %>%
    dplyr::pull(Location)
  AML_patient_RNA_mutations[[stage]] <- samples_stage_loc
}

upset(fromList(AML_patient_ATA_mutations),
      nsets = length(AML_patient_ATA_mutations),
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size ATA",
      mb.ratio = c(0.6, 0.4),
      main.bar.color = "#345170",
      sets.bar.color = "#EBAC8C",
      text.scale = c(2, 2, 2, 1.5, 2, 1.5)
)

upset(fromList(AML_patient_RNA_mutations),
      nsets = length(AML_patient_RNA_mutations),
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Intersection Size RNA",
      mb.ratio = c(0.6, 0.4),
      main.bar.color = "#345170",
      sets.bar.color = "#EBAC8C",
      text.scale = c(2, 2, 2, 1.5, 2, 1.5)
)

# export csv
AML_SSM_scATA_DX <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_ATA_mutations$DX) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scATA_REM <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_ATA_mutations$REM) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scATA_REL <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_ATA_mutations$REL) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scATA_all <- data.frame(Location = unique(unlist(AML_patient_ATA_mutations))) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scRNA_DX <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_RNA_mutations$DX) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scRNA_REM <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_RNA_mutations$REM) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scRNA_REL <- data.frame(Location = AML_patient_RNA_mutations$REL) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

AML_SSM_scRNA_all <- data.frame(Location = unique(unlist(AML_patient_RNA_mutations))) %>%
  separate(Location, into = c("chr", "pos", "ref", "alt"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(end = pos) %>% select(chr, pos, end, ref, alt, everything())

#write.csv(AML_SSM_scATA_DX, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scATA_DX.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scATA_REM, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scATA_REM.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scATA_REL, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scATA_REL.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scRNA_DX, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scRNA_DX.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scRNA_REM, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scRNA_REM.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scRNA_REL, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scRNA_REL.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scATA_all, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scATA_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(AML_SSM_scRNA_all, "../Results/AML/AML_SSM_scRNA_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

networkD3 interactive sankey plot

intersection of mutations number from different stages were manually calculated and used to generate the sankey plot below (see `# extract different stage patient mutations`).

# networkD3 Example
```{r networkD3Example, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# A connection data frame is a list of flows with intensity for each flow
links <- data.frame(
  source=c("Dx","Rem", "Dx", "Dx", "Rem", "Rel"), 
  target=c("Rem","Rel", "Rel", "Dx", "Rem", "Rel"), 
  value=c(1321 + 3652, 194 + 3652, 4209 + 3652, 1236, 88, 499)
)

links <- data.frame(
  source=c("Dx","Rem", "Dx", "Dx", "Rem", "Rel"), 
  target=c("Rem","Rel", "Rel", "Dx", "Rem", "Rel"), 
  value=c(375 + 1404, 400 + 1404, 749 + 1404, 134, 122, 158)
)


links <- data.frame(
  source=c("Dx_ATA","Rem_ATA", "Dx_ATA", "Dx_ATA", "Rem_ATA", "Rel_ATA", "Dx_RNA","Rem_RNA", "Dx_RNA", "Dx_RNA", "Rem_RNA", "Rel_RNA"), 
  target=c("Rem_ATA","Rel_ATA", "Rel_ATA", "Dx_ATA", "Rem_ATA", "Rel_ATA", "Rem_RNA","Rel_RNA", "Rel_RNA", "Dx_RNA", "Rem_RNA", "Rel_RNA"), 
  value=c(1321 + 3652, 194 + 3652, 4209 + 3652, 1236, 88, 499, 375 + 1404, 400 + 1404, 749 + 1404, 134, 122, 158)
)


# merge duplicate links
links <- links %>%
  group_by(source, target) %>%
  summarise(value = sum(value), .groups = "drop")

nodes <- data.frame(
  name = unique(c(links$source, links$target))
)

links$IDsource <- match(links$source, nodes$name)-1 
links$IDtarget <- match(links$target, nodes$name)-1

# plot
p <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = links,
  Nodes = nodes,
  Source = "IDsource",
  Target = "IDtarget",
  Value = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  sinksRight = FALSE
)

p

#saveWidget(p, "/Users/liqun/Downloads/sankey_plot.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
```

# sampleCellsNumber
```{r sampleCellsNumber}
sample_order <- c("AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                  "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                  "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM", 
                  "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL", 
                  "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                  "AML6_DX", "AML6_REM", "AML6_REL",
                  "AML7_DX", "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                  "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                  "AML9_DX", "AML9_REM", "AML9_REL", 
                  "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                  "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                  "AML12_DX", "AML12_REM", "AML12_REL", 
                  "AML13_DX", "AML13_REM", "AML13_REL", 
                  "AML14_DX", "AML14_REM", 
                  "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                  "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                  "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                  "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                  "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                  "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                  "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                  "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL", 
                  "AML23_DX", "AML23_REM", "AML23_REL", 
                  "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                  "AML25_DX", "AML25_REM", "AML25_REL", 
                  "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                  "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL",
                  "AML28_REM", "AML28_REL")

AML_sampleInfo_plot <- AML_sampleInfo[, c("sampleAlias", "Cells_scRNA", "Cells_scATAC")] %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Cells"),   
    names_to = "Tag",
    values_to = "CellsNum"
  )

AML_sampleInfo_plot$sampleAlias <- factor(AML_sampleInfo_plot$sampleAlias, levels = sample_order)

p_sampleCellsNumber <- ggplot(AML_sampleInfo_plot, aes(x = sampleAlias, y = CellsNum, fill = Tag)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cells_scRNA" = "#EBAC8C", "Cells_scATAC" = "#345170")) +
  labs(title = "cells number", x = "samples", y = "cells number") +
  theme_classic() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_sampleCellsNumber
```

# mutation features similarity
```{r mutationFeaturesSimilarity}
comparisionTypes <- colnames(AML_mutation_features)

data_cosine_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(comparisionTypes), ncol = length(comparisionTypes)))

rownames(data_cosine_similarity) <- comparisionTypes
colnames(data_cosine_similarity) <- comparisionTypes

for (i in 1:nrow(data_cosine_similarity)){
  type_i <- rownames(data_cosine_similarity)[i]
  for (j in 1:ncol(data_cosine_similarity)){
    type_j <- colnames(data_cosine_similarity)[j]
    cs <- cosine_similarity(AML_mutation_features[,type_i], AML_mutation_features[,type_j])
    data_cosine_similarity[i, j] <- cs
  }
}

mat <- as.matrix(data_cosine_similarity)
rownames(mat) <- rownames(data_cosine_similarity)
colnames(mat) <- colnames(data_cosine_similarity)
names_order <- c("scATAC_scMutrace", "scRNA_scMutrace", "scATA_scMutrace_DX", "scATA_scMutrace_REM",
                 "scATA_scMutrace_REL", "scRNA_scMutrace_DX", "scRNA_scMutrace_REM", "scRNA_scMutrace_REL",
                 "scATAC_pub", "WGS_AML", "WGS_MPN", "WGS_skin", "WGS_headSCC")
mat <- mat[names_order, names_order]
mat_upper <- mat
mat_upper[lower.tri(mat_upper)] <- NA

mat_min <- min(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
mat_max <- max(mat, na.rm = TRUE)

col_fun_2 <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = seq(mat_min, mat_max, length.out = 4),
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

Heatmap(mat_upper,
        name = "Cosine\nSimilarity",
        na_col = "grey90",
        col = col_fun_2,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
          if (!is.na(mat_upper[i, j])) {
            grid.text(sprintf("%.2f", mat_upper[i, j]), x, y, 
                      gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, col = "white"))
          }
        })

names_order_show <- c("scATAC_scMutrace", "scRNA_scMutrace",
                 "scATAC_pub", "WGS_AML", "WGS_headSCC", "WGS_skin")

mat_show <- mat[names_order_show, names_order_show]

corrplot(
  mat_show, 
  order = "original", 
  method = 'color', 
  type = 'upper', 
  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "Reds"))(100), 
  col.lim = c(0, 1),
  addCoef.col = "white"
)
```

# mutation features contribution
```{r mutationFeaturesContribution}
sbs_color <- c(
  "SBS1" = "#a6cee3", "SBS2" = "#33a02c", "SBS5" = "#1f78b4",
  "SBS7a" = "#e31a1c", "SBS7b" = "#fc8d59", "SBS7c" = "#fdd49e", 
  "SBS13" = "#252525", "SBS15" = "#bdbdbd", "SBS15" = "#d9d9d9",
  "SBS18" =  "#f0f0f0", "SBS19" = "#969696",  "SBS23" = "#969696",
  "SBS31" = "#737373", "SBS39" = "#525252", "SBS54" = "#252525"
)

AML_mutation_features_contribution <- read.table("../Data/HumanpAML/COSMIC_SBS96_Activities.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
AML_mutation_features_contribution_long <- AML_mutation_features_contribution %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Samples,
    names_to = "Signature",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

AML_mutation_features_contribution_long_pct <- AML_mutation_features_contribution_long %>%
  group_by(Samples) %>%
  mutate(Percent = Count / sum(Count) * 100)

AML_mutation_features_contribution_long_pct$Samples <- factor(AML_mutation_features_contribution_long_pct$Samples, levels = c("scATAC_scMutrace", "scRNA_scMutrace", "scATA_scMutrace_DX", "scATA_scMutrace_REM",
                 "scATA_scMutrace_REL", "scRNA_scMutrace_DX", "scRNA_scMutrace_REM", "scRNA_scMutrace_REL",
                 "scATAC_pub", "WGS_AML", "WGS_MPN", "WGS_skin", "WGS_headSCC"))

p_mutation_featureDistribution <- ggplot(AML_mutation_features_contribution_long_pct, aes(x = Samples, y = Percent, fill = Signature)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sbs_color) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  ylab("Percentage (%)")

p_mutation_featureDistribution
```

# census genes
```{r censusGenes}
scATA_rare_locs <- AML_SSM_scATA_bed %>% filter(freq == "rare") %>% pull(Location)
scRNA_rare_locs <- AML_SSM_scRNA_bed %>% filter(freq == "rare") %>% pull(Location)

AML_scATA_ann_tier <- AML_scATA_ann[AML_scATA_ann$Gene.refGene %in% AML_genes_tiers$Gene,] %>% filter(Location %in% scATA_rare_locs)
AML_scRNA_ann_tier <- AML_scRNA_ann[AML_scRNA_ann$Gene.refGene %in% AML_genes_tiers$Gene,] %>% filter(Location %in% scRNA_rare_locs)

AML_SSM_scATA_ann_tier <- merge(AML_SSM_scATA, AML_scATA_ann_tier, by = "Location")
AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier <- merge(AML_SSM_scRNA, AML_scRNA_ann_tier, by = "Location")

all_tier_genes <- unique(union(AML_scRNA_ann_tier$Gene.refGene, AML_scATA_ann_tier$Gene.refGene))

all_tier_genes_loc_scRNA <- AML_scRNA_ann_tier %>%
  dplyr::select(Location, Gene.refGene) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Gene.refGene %in% all_tier_genes)

all_tier_genes_loc_scATA <- AML_scATA_ann_tier %>%
  dplyr::select(Location, Gene.refGene) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Gene.refGene %in% all_tier_genes)

# remove samples based on cells number
sample_selected_scRNA <- c("AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                  "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                  "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM", 
                  "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL", 
                  "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                  "AML6_DX", "AML6_REM", "AML6_REL",
                             "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                  "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                  "AML9_DX", "AML9_REM", "AML9_REL", 
                  "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                  "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                  "AML12_DX", "AML12_REM", "AML12_REL", 
                  "AML13_DX", "AML13_REM", "AML13_REL", 
                  "AML14_DX", "AML14_REM", 
                  "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                  "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                  "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                  "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                  "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                  "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                  "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                  "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL", 
                  "AML23_DX", "AML23_REM", "AML23_REL", 
                  "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                  "AML25_DX", "AML25_REM", "AML25_REL", 
                  "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                  "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL",
                  "AML28_REM", "AML28_REL")

sample_selected_scRNA <- paste0(sample_selected_scRNA, "_scRNA")

sample_selected_scATA <- c("AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                  "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                  "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM",
                  "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL",
                  "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                  "AML6_DX",             "AML6_REL",
                  "AML7_DX", "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                  "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                  
                  "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                  "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                  "AML12_DX",              "AML12_REL", 
                  "AML13_DX",              "AML13_REL", 
                  "AML14_DX",  
                  "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                  "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                  "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                  "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                  "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                  "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                  "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                  "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL", 
                  
                  "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                  "AML25_DX", "AML25_REM", "AML25_REL", 
                  "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                  "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL")

# census genes group
oncogene_RAS <- c("AFF3", "CBFB", "CBL", "CSF3R", "EGFR", "ELF4", "ETS2", "ETV6", "EZH2", "FLT3", "GATA1", "HRAS", "IDH1",
                  "IKZF1", "KIT", "KRAS", "MEIS1", "MET", "MLLT1", "MLLT3", "MLLT4", "MYC", "NPM1", "NRAS", "NUP214",
                  "PLXNB1", "PTPN11", "RUNX1", "RUNX1T1", "SPI1", "SYK", "TAF1", "VIM", "WT1")

suppressor <- c("APC", "ARID1A", "ASXL1", "AXIN1", "CBFA2T2", "CBL", "CEBPA", "CREBBP", "DICER1", "ERF", "ETS2", "ETV6", 
                "EZH2", "FAT1", "FLT3", "IDH1", "IKZF1", "KDM5A", "LLGL1", "MAD1L1", "NF1", "NPM1", "PHF6", "PTEN", 
                "PTPN11", "PTPRJ", "PTPRT", "RUNX1", "RYR1", "SETD2", "SPI1", "SYK", "TET2", "TP53", "TRIM24", "VIM", "WT1")

transcription_factors <- c("AFF3", "ANKRD30A", "BCOR", "CBFB", "CEBPA", "CREBBP", "ELF1", "ELF4", "EP300", "FOXP2", "GATA1", 
                           "GATA2", "HDAC9", "HOXA5", "HOXB3", "IKZF1", "MED23", "MEIS1", "NCOR1", "NONO", "PHF2", "RUNX1", 
                           "RUNX1T1", "SIN3A", "SRCAP", "TAF1", "TAF1L", "THRAP3", "TLE2", "TRIM24", "TRPS1", "TRRAP", "VEZF1", "WT1")

epigenetic_modifier <- c("ASXL1", "ASXL2", "ATRX", "CHD4", "CREBBP", "EP300", "EZH2", "IDH1", "IDH2", "JMJD1C", "KDM5A", "MLLT1", "MLLT10", 
                         "MLLT3", "MLLT4", "MLLT6", "MYH11", "MYH2", "MYH4", "SETD2", "SRCAP", "TET2", "TRRAP")

tyrosine_kinase <- c("CNKSR1", "EGFR", "EPHA6", "FLT3", "FLT4", "KIT", "MET", "PTK6", "ROR1", "SYK", "TYK2")

nuclear_transport <- c("NPM1", "NUP205", "NUP214")

phosphatase <- c("ANKRD28", "APC", "AXIN1", "KIAA1244", "PPM1F", "PPP1R14B", "PPP1R14C", "PPP1R15A", "PPP1R15B", 
                 "PPP2R2D", "PPP4R4", "PPP6R3", "PTEN", "PTPN11", "PTPRA", "PTPRF", "PTPRH", "PTPRJ", "PTPRT", "TPTE")

structural_integrity <- c("BSN", "COL12A1", "CSPG4", "DNAH2", "DNAH9", "FLNB", "LAMA1", "MACF1", "MAP7", "NCAM1", "PCLO", "RELN", "TRO")

ETS_Family <- c("ELF1", "ELF4", "ERF", "ETS2", "ETV6", "SPI1")

cohesin <- c("RAD21", "SMC3", "STAG2")

splicing <- c("DHX15", "NONO", "SUPT5H", "U2AF1")

growth_factor <- c("CSF3R", "VEGFC")

genes_groups <- c(oncogene_RAS, suppressor, transcription_factors, epigenetic_modifier, 
                  tyrosine_kinase, nuclear_transport, phosphatase, structural_integrity,
                  ETS_Family, cohesin, splicing, growth_factor)


sample_selected_scATA <- paste0(sample_selected_scATA, "_scATA")

AML_sample_mutations <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(sample_selected_scRNA) + length(sample_selected_scATA), ncol = length(all_tier_genes)))
colnames(AML_sample_mutations) <- all_tier_genes
rownames(AML_sample_mutations) <- c(sample_selected_scRNA, sample_selected_scATA)
AML_sample_mutations$id <- rownames(AML_sample_mutations)

AML_sample_mutations <- separate(AML_sample_mutations, col = "id", into = c("patient", "stage", "type"), sep = "_", remove = TRUE)
AML_sample_mutations$sampleID <- paste(AML_sample_mutations$patient, AML_sample_mutations$stage, sep = "_")
AML_sample_mutations <- AML_sample_mutations[,c("patient", "stage", "type", "sampleID", all_tier_genes)]

col_AML_scRNA_ann_tier <- setdiff(colnames(AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier), colnames(AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier)[grep("_L", colnames(AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier))])
AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier <- AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier[,col_AML_scRNA_ann_tier]

# scRNA
for (i in 1:nrow(AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier)){
  gene_tmp <- AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier[i,]$Gene.refGene
  mut_samples <- colnames(AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier)[AML_SSM_scRNA_ann_tier[i,] == "Mut"]
  for (mut_sample in mut_samples){
    if (paste0(mut_sample, "_scRNA") %in% rownames(AML_sample_mutations)){
       AML_sample_mutations[paste0(mut_sample, "_scRNA"), gene_tmp] <- 1
    }
  }
}

# scATA
for (i in 1:nrow(AML_SSM_scATA_ann_tier)){
  gene_tmp <- AML_SSM_scATA_ann_tier[i,]$Gene.refGene
  mut_samples <- colnames(AML_SSM_scATA_ann_tier)[AML_SSM_scATA_ann_tier[i,] == "Mut"]
  for (mut_sample in mut_samples){
    if (paste0(mut_sample, "_scATA") %in% rownames(AML_sample_mutations)){
      AML_sample_mutations[paste0(mut_sample, "_scATA"), gene_tmp] <- 1
    }
  }
}

col_fun <- c(
  "0" = "#404040",
  "1" = "#ca0020"
)

sample_order_plotMut <- c(
  "AML1_DX_scRNA", "AML1_DX_scATA", "AML1_REM_scRNA", "AML1_REM_scATA",
  "AML2_DX_scRNA", "AML2_DX_scATA", "AML2_REM_scRNA", "AML2_REM_scATA", "AML2_REL_scRNA", "AML2_REL_scATA",
  "AML3_DX_scRNA", "AML3_DX_scATA", "AML3_REM_scRNA", "AML3_REM_scATA",
  "AML4_DX_scRNA", "AML4_DX_scATA", "AML4_REL_scRNA", "AML4_REL_scATA",
  "AML5_DX_scRNA", "AML5_DX_scATA", "AML5_REM_scRNA", "AML5_REM_scATA", "AML5_REL_scRNA", "AML5_REL_scATA",
  "AML6_DX_scRNA", "AML6_DX_scATA", "AML6_REM_scRNA", "AML6_REL_scRNA", "AML6_REL_scATA",
  "AML7_DX_scATA", "AML7_REM_scRNA", "AML7_REM_scATA", "AML7_REL_scRNA", "AML7_REL_scATA",
  "AML8_DX_scRNA", "AML8_DX_scATA", "AML8_REM_scRNA", "AML8_REM_scATA", "AML8_REL_scRNA", "AML8_REL_scATA",
  "AML9_DX_scRNA", "AML9_REM_scRNA", "AML9_REL_scRNA",
  "AML10_DX_scRNA", "AML10_DX_scATA", "AML10_REM_scRNA", "AML10_REM_scATA", "AML10_REL_scRNA", "AML10_REL_scATA",
  "AML11_DX_scRNA", "AML11_DX_scATA", "AML11_REM_scRNA", "AML11_REM_scATA", "AML11_REL_scRNA", "AML11_REL_scATA",
  "AML12_DX_scRNA", "AML12_DX_scATA",  "AML12_REM_scRNA", "AML12_REL_scRNA", "AML12_REL_scATA",
  "AML13_DX_scRNA", "AML13_DX_scATA", "AML13_REM_scRNA", "AML13_REL_scRNA", "AML13_REL_scATA",
  "AML14_DX_scRNA", "AML14_DX_scATA", "AML14_REM_scRNA",
  "AML15_DX_scRNA", "AML15_DX_scATA", "AML15_REM_scRNA", "AML15_REM_scATA", "AML15_REL_scRNA", "AML15_REL_scATA",
  "AML16_DX_scRNA", "AML16_DX_scATA", "AML16_REM_scRNA", "AML16_REM_scATA", "AML16_REL_scRNA", "AML16_REL_scATA",
  "AML17_DX_scRNA", "AML17_DX_scATA", "AML17_REL_scRNA", "AML17_REL_scATA",
  "AML18_DX_scRNA", "AML18_DX_scATA", "AML18_REL_scRNA", "AML18_REL_scATA",
  "AML19_DX_scRNA", "AML19_DX_scATA", "AML19_REL_scRNA", "AML19_REL_scATA",
  "AML20_DX_scRNA", "AML20_DX_scATA", "AML20_REM_scRNA", "AML20_REM_scATA",
  "AML21_DX_scRNA", "AML21_DX_scATA", "AML21_REM_scRNA", "AML21_REM_scATA", "AML21_REL_scRNA", "AML21_REL_scATA",
  "AML22_DX_scRNA", "AML22_DX_scATA", "AML22_REM_scRNA", "AML22_REM_scATA", "AML22_REL_scRNA", "AML22_REL_scATA",
  "AML23_DX_scRNA", "AML23_REM_scRNA", "AML23_REL_scRNA",
  "AML24_DX_scRNA", "AML24_DX_scATA",  "AML24_REM_scRNA", "AML24_REM_scATA", "AML24_REL_scRNA", "AML24_REL_scATA",
  "AML25_DX_scRNA", "AML25_DX_scATA", "AML25_REM_scRNA", "AML25_REM_scATA", "AML25_REL_scRNA", "AML25_REL_scATA",
  "AML26_DX_scRNA", "AML26_DX_scATA", "AML26_REM_scRNA", "AML26_REM_scATA", "AML26_REL_scRNA", "AML26_REL_scATA",
  "AML27_DX_scRNA", "AML27_DX_scATA", "AML27_REM_scRNA", "AML27_REM_scATA", "AML27_REL_scRNA", "AML27_REL_scATA",
  "AML28_REM_scRNA", "AML28_REL_scRNA"
)

sampleID_p <- sapply(sample_order_plotMut, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][1])
Stages_p <- sapply(sample_order_plotMut, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][2])
Types_p <- sapply(sample_order_plotMut, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][3])
group_p <- AML_sampleInfo$SubgroupAnnotation[match(paste(sampleID_p, Stages_p, sep = "_"), AML_sampleInfo$sampleAlias)]
risk_p <- AML_sampleInfo$RiskGroup[match(paste(sampleID_p, Stages_p, sep = "_"), AML_sampleInfo$sampleAlias)]

row_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  Sample = anno_text(sampleID_p, gp = gpar(fontsize = 5)),
  Stage = Stages_p,
  Type = Types_p,
  Group = group_p,
  Risk = risk_p,
  col = list(Stage = c("DX" = "#d9d9d9", "REM" = "#969696", "REL" = "#000000"),
             Risk = c("Low" = "#01665e", "High" = "#8c510a"),
             Type = c("scRNA" = "#EBAC8C", "scATA" = "#345170"),
             Group = c("RUNX" = "#33a02c", "MLL" = "#ff7f00", "FLT" = "#6a3d9a", "CBFB" = "#ffff99", "Other" = "#1f78b4"))
  )

mat <- as.matrix(AML_sample_mutations[sample_order_plotMut, 5:ncol(AML_sample_mutations)])
zero_count <- colSums(mat == 0)
mat_sorted <- mat[, order(zero_count, decreasing = FALSE)]

Heatmap(mat_sorted,
        name = "Mutation",
        left_annotation = row_anno,
        col = col_fun,
        show_row_names = FALSE,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 5))
```

# calMutFraction
```{r calMutFraction}
sample_selected_scRNA <- c("AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                  "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                  "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM", 
                  "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL", 
                  "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                  "AML6_DX", "AML6_REM", "AML6_REL",
                             "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                  "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                  "AML9_DX", "AML9_REM", "AML9_REL", 
                  "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                  "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                  "AML12_DX", "AML12_REM", "AML12_REL", 
                  "AML13_DX", "AML13_REM", "AML13_REL", 
                  "AML14_DX", "AML14_REM", 
                  "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                  "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                  "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                  "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                  "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                  "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                  "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                  "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL", 
                  "AML23_DX", "AML23_REM", "AML23_REL", 
                  "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                  "AML25_DX", "AML25_REM", "AML25_REL", 
                  "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                  "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL",
                  "AML28_REM", "AML28_REL")

sample_selected_scATA <- c("AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                  "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                  "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM",
                  "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL",
                  "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                  "AML6_DX",             "AML6_REL",
                  "AML7_DX", "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                  "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                  
                  "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                  "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                  "AML12_DX",              "AML12_REL", 
                  "AML13_DX",              "AML13_REL",
                  "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                  "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                  "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                  "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                  "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                  "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                  "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                  "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL",
                  "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                  "AML25_DX", "AML25_REM", "AML25_REL", 
                  "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                  "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL")

num_cutoff <- 0
AML_mutationFraction <- data.frame(
  Location = character(),
  Gene = character(),
  Sample = character(),
  Type = character(),
  DX_Mut_Num = numeric(),
  REM_Mut_Num = numeric(),
  REL_Mut_Num = numeric(),
  DX_Total_Num = numeric(),
  REM_Total_Num = numeric(),
  REL_Total_Num = numeric(),
  DX = numeric(),
  REM = numeric(),
  REL = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

loc_total <- unique(c(AML_scATA_NotCensus_locs, AML_scRNA_NotCensus_locs))
line_i <- 0

for (loc in loc_total){
  # message(paste0("Processing ", loc))
  # gene
  gene <- NA
  if (loc %in% AML_scATA_ann$Location){
    gene <- AML_scATA_ann %>% 
      filter(Location == loc) %>% 
      pull(Gene.refGene)
  } else if (loc %in% AML_scRNA_ann$Location){
    gene <- AML_scRNA_ann %>% 
      filter(Location == loc) %>% 
      pull(Gene.refGene)
  }
  
  # ---------- ATA ----------
  samples_ata_loc <- AML_SSM_scATA %>%
    filter(Location == loc) %>%
    select(any_of(sample_selected_scATA)) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    { names(.)[. == "Mut"] }
  
  if(length(samples_ata_loc) > 0){
    # message(paste0("  Processing scATA..."))
    sample_ids <- unique(str_extract(samples_ata_loc, "AML[0-9]+"))
    for (sample_id in sample_ids){
      line_i <- line_i + 1
      cells_all   <- retriveCellsByLocation(AML_ATA_CSM_list[[sample_id]], loc)
      cells_mut   <- cells_all$Mut
      cells_total <- cells_all$Total
      
      num_mut_dx  <- sum(grepl("DX", cells_mut))
      num_mut_rem <- sum(grepl("REM", cells_mut))
      num_mut_rel <- sum(grepl("REL", cells_mut))
      num_total_dx  <- sum(grepl("DX", cells_total))
      num_total_rem <- sum(grepl("REM", cells_total))
      num_total_rel <- sum(grepl("REL", cells_total))
      
      # QC
      if (num_total_dx >= num_cutoff & num_total_rem >= num_cutoff & num_total_rel >= num_cutoff){
    
        frac_dx  <- ifelse(num_total_dx > 0, num_mut_dx/num_total_dx, 0)
        frac_rem <- ifelse(num_total_rem > 0, num_mut_rem/num_total_rem, 0)
        frac_rel <- ifelse(num_total_rel > 0, num_mut_rel/num_total_rel, 0)
        
        AML_mutationFraction[line_i, ] <- list(
          Location = loc,
          Gene = gene,
          Sample = sample_id,
          Type = "scATA",
          DX_Mut_Num = num_mut_dx,
          REM_Mut_Num = num_mut_rem,
          REL_Mut_Num = num_mut_rel,
          DX_Total_Num = num_total_dx,
          REM_Total_Num = num_total_rem,
          REL_Total_Num = num_total_rel,
          DX = frac_dx,
          REM = frac_rem,
          REL = frac_rel
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  # ---------- RNA ----------
  samples_rna_loc <- AML_SSM_scRNA %>%
    filter(Location == loc) %>%
    select(any_of(sample_selected_scRNA)) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    { names(.)[. == "Mut"] }
  
  if(length(samples_rna_loc) > 0){
    sample_ids <- unique(str_extract(samples_rna_loc, "AML[0-9]+"))
    # message(paste0("  Processing scRNA..."))
    for (sample_id in sample_ids){
      line_i <- line_i + 1
      cells_all   <- retriveCellsByLocation(AML_RNA_CSM_list[[sample_id]], loc)
      cells_mut   <- cells_all$Mut
      cells_total <- cells_all$Total
      
      num_mut_dx  <- sum(grepl("DX", cells_mut))
      num_mut_rem <- sum(grepl("REM", cells_mut))
      num_mut_rel <- sum(grepl("REL", cells_mut))
      num_total_dx  <- sum(grepl("DX", cells_total))
      num_total_rem <- sum(grepl("REM", cells_total))
      num_total_rel <- sum(grepl("REL", cells_total))
      
      # QC
      if (num_total_dx >= num_cutoff & num_total_rem >= num_cutoff & num_total_rel >= num_cutoff){
        
        frac_dx  <- ifelse(num_total_dx > 0, num_mut_dx/num_total_dx, 0)
        frac_rem <- ifelse(num_total_rem > 0, num_mut_rem/num_total_rem, 0)
        frac_rel <- ifelse(num_total_rel > 0, num_mut_rel/num_total_rel, 0)
        
        AML_mutationFraction[line_i, ] <- list(
          Location = loc,
          Gene = gene,
          Sample = sample_id,
          Type = "scRNA",
          DX_Mut_Num = num_mut_dx,
          REM_Mut_Num = num_mut_rem,
          REL_Mut_Num = num_mut_rel,
          DX_Total_Num = num_total_dx,
          REM_Total_Num = num_total_rem,
          REL_Total_Num = num_total_rel,
          DX = frac_dx,
          REM = frac_rem,
          REL = frac_rel
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

AML_mutationFraction <- na.omit(AML_mutationFraction)

stage_color_setting <- c(
    "DX" = "#4DAF4A",
    "REM" = "#377EB8",
    "REL"   = "#E41A1C"
  )

common_loc_scATA_scRNA <- unique(intersect(AML_SSM_scATA$Location, AML_SSM_scRNA$Location))
common_loc_scATA_scRNA_census <- intersect(AML_scATA_ann_tier$Location, AML_scRNA_ann_tier$Location)

AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs <- AML_mutationFraction %>% filter(Location %in% common_loc_scATA_scRNA)
AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs$Tag <- paste(AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs$Location, AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs$Sample, sep = "-")

AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs <- AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs %>%
  group_by(Tag) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup()

df_fractionSimilarity_DX_plot <- AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs %>%
  #filter(DX_Num >= 5) %>%
  select(Location, Sample, Type, DX) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = DX) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(Stage = "DX")

df_fractionSimilarity_REM_plot <- AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs %>%
  #filter(REM_Num >= 5) %>%
  select(Location, Sample, Type, REM) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = REM) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(Stage = "REM")

df_fractionSimilarity_REL_plot <- AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs %>%
  #filter(REL_Num >= 5) %>%
  select(Location, Sample, Type, REL) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = REL) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  mutate(Stage = "REL")

df_fractionSimilarity_all <- bind_rows(
  df_fractionSimilarity_DX_plot,
  df_fractionSimilarity_REM_plot,
  df_fractionSimilarity_REL_plot
)

df_fractionSimilarity_long <- AML_mutationFraction_commonLocs %>%
  select(Location, Sample, Type, DX, REM, REL) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(DX, REM, REL), names_to = "Stage", values_to = "Fraction") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = Fraction)

df_fractionSimilarity_long$Stage <- factor(df_fractionSimilarity_long$Stage, levels = c("DX", "REM", "REL"))

ggplot(df_fractionSimilarity_all, aes(x = scATA, y = scRNA, color = Stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(fill = Stage), alpha = 0.2) +
  stat_cor(aes(label = paste(..r.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"), group = Stage),
           method = "pearson",
           show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_color_setting) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = stage_color_setting) +
  labs(
    x = "Fraction (scATA)",
    y = "Fraction (scRNA)",
    title = "Comparison of mutation fractions between scATA and scRNA"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

df_wide <- df_fractionSimilarity_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Stage,
    values_from = c(scATA, scRNA)
  )


p_scRNA_fractionMutation <- ggplot(df_fractionSimilarity_long, aes(x = as.factor(Stage), y = scRNA, color=Stage)) + 
  labs(x="", y="Fraction of mutant cells") +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5, lwd = 1, outliers = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Location), color="gray" ,position = position_dodge(0.2), alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Stage, group=Location), size = 0.1,  position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_color_setting) + theme_classic() +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(
      c("DX", "REL"),
      c("DX", "REM"),
      c("REL", "REM")
    ),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif"
  )

p_scATA_fractionMutation <- ggplot(df_fractionSimilarity_long, aes(x = as.factor(Stage), y = scATA, color=Stage)) + 
  labs(x="", y="Fraction of mutant cells") +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.5, lwd = 1, outliers = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group=Location), color="gray" ,position = position_dodge(0.2), alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Stage, group=Location), size = 0.1,  position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_color_setting) + theme_classic() +
  stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = list(
      c("DX", "REL"),
      c("DX", "REM"),
      c("REL", "REM")
    ),
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.signif"
  )

p_scRNA_fractionMutation
p_scATA_fractionMutation
```

*JointCCA_AML8.rds* contains the UMAP coordinates and metadata for the integrated scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq data of AML8 sample and was generated using ArchR package (see `0_pipelineFunctions.R`> # pipelines for processing scATAC-seq data).

*AML8_scRNA_meta.rds* contains the metadata for scRNA-seq data of AML8 sample and was generated using Seurat package (see `0_pipelineFunctions.R` > # pipelines for porcessing scRNA-seq data).

# RNAIntegration Example
```{r RNAIntegrationExample}
data_save_block <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/JointCCA_AML8.rds")
meta_scRNA <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML8_scRNA_meta.rds")


df_AML08_CCA <- data.frame(
  UMAP1 = data_save_block$UMAP1,
  UMAP2 = data_save_block$UMAP2,
  Assay = data_save_block$Assay,
  Group = data_save_block$Group
)

getSampleStage<- function(x, meta_scRNA) {
  if (grepl("_reference$", x)) {
    cell_id <- sub("_reference$", "", x)
    if (cell_id %in% rownames(meta_scRNA)) {
      return(meta_scRNA[cell_id, "orig.ident"])
    } else {
      return(NA)
    }
  } else if (grepl("_query$", x)) {
    sample <- sub("#.*", "", x)
    return(sample)
  } else {
    return(NA)
  }
}

df_AML08_CCA$stage <- sapply(rownames(df_AML08_CCA), getSampleStage, meta_scRNA = meta_scRNA)

assay_colors <- c("ATAC" = "#272E6A", "RNA" = "#D51F26")

stage_colors <- c(
    "AML8_DX" = "#d9d9d9",
    "AML8_REM" = "#969696",
    "AML8_REL"   = "#000000")

group_colors <- c("B.Cell" = "#7DB18A", "CD16.Monocytes" = "#6F4A98", "CD4.Memory" = "#4C502D",
                  "CD4.Naive" = "#201C19", "CD8.Effector" = "#2A5B31", "CD8.Memory" = "#69AD46",
                  "CD8.Naive" = "#5B521A", "cDC" = "#8587B1", "CLP" = "#B9D5AB", "Early.Basophil" = "#CD6D82",
                  "Early.Erythrocyte" = "#B12579", "GMP" = "#25316E", "HSC" = "#EAA63A", "Late.Erythrocyte" = "#EAAFC0",
                  "Monocytes" = "#406DB1", "NK" = "#4C662E", "pDC" = "#62B1E1", "Plasma" = "#D2E7EB",
                  "Pre.B.Cell" = "#45948E", "Progenitor" = "#AA872C", "Unknown" = "#EAEAEA")

p_UMAPbyAssay <- ggplot(df_AML08_CCA, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Assay)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = assay_colors) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "UMAP by Assay")

p_UMAPbyGroup <- ggplot(df_AML08_CCA, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "UMAP by Group")

p_UMAPbyStage <- ggplot(df_AML08_CCA, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = stage)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = stage_colors) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(title = "UMAP by Stage")

p_UMAPbyAssay
p_UMAPbyGroup
p_UMAPbyStage

# from 0_pipelineFunctions.R > # pipelines for processing scATAC-seq data
# scATAC_data <- loadArchRProject("../Data/AML/singleCellMatrix/scATACTest/")
# proj <- addPeak2GeneLinks(scATAC_data, k = 20)
# Get P2G Links
# p2g <- getPeak2GeneLinks(proj)
# p_plotPeak2GeneHeatmap <- plotPeak2GeneHeatmap(proj, groupBy = "predictedGroup_Un", palGroup = group_colors)
# ComplexHeatmap::draw(p_plotPeak2GeneHeatmap, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
```

# celltype annotation similarity
```{r celltypeAnnotationSimilarity}
data_cellTypeAnn_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(setdiff(cellTypes, "Unknown")), 
                                                    ncol = length(setdiff(cellTypes, "Unknown"))))

rownames(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- setdiff(cellTypes, "Unknown")
colnames(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- setdiff(cellTypes, "Unknown")

for (i in 1:nrow(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
  # row > scRN
  ct_scRNA <- rownames(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[i]
  cell_barcode_scRNA <- AML_scRNA_meta %>% 
    mutate(CellTag = rownames(.)) %>%  
    dplyr::filter(Classified_Celltype == ct_scRNA) %>%
    pull(CellTag)
  
  for (j in 1:ncol(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
    ct_scATA <- colnames(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[j]
    cell_barcode_scATA <- AML_scATA_meta %>% 
      dplyr::filter(predictedGroup_Un == ct_scATA) %>%
      pull(predictedCell_RNAQun)
    
    similarity_score <- length(unique(intersect(cell_barcode_scRNA, cell_barcode_scATA)))/length(unique(union(cell_barcode_scRNA, cell_barcode_scATA)))
    data_cellTypeAnn_similarity[i, j] <- similarity_score
  }
}

breaks <- seq(min(as.matrix(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)), 
              max(as.matrix(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)), 
              length.out = 4)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = breaks,
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

row_types <- rownames(as.matrix(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity))
col_types <- colnames(as.matrix(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity))

group_colors <- c("B.Cell" = "#7DB18A", "CD16.Monocytes" = "#6F4A98", "CD4.Memory" = "#4C502D",
                  "CD4.Naive" = "#201C19", "CD8.Effector" = "#2A5B31", "CD8.Memory" = "#69AD46",
                  "CD8.Naive" = "#5B521A", "cDC" = "#8587B1", "CLP" = "#B9D5AB", "Early.Basophil" = "#CD6D82",
                  "Early.Erythrocyte" = "#B12579", "GMP" = "#25316E", "HSC" = "#EAA63A", "Late.Erythrocyte" = "#EAAFC0",
                  "Monocytes" = "#406DB1", "NK" = "#4C662E", "pDC" = "#62B1E1", "Plasma" = "#D2E7EB",
                  "Pre.B.Cell" = "#45948E", "Progenitor" = "#AA872C", "Unknown" = "#EAEAEA")

order_annotation <- c("HSC", "Progenitor",
                      "GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC",
                      "CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Naive", "CD4.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Effector", "NK",
                      "Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte",  "Early.Basophil", "Plasma")

mat_ord <- as.matrix(data_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[order_annotation, order_annotation]
row_types_ord <- row_types[match(order_annotation, row_types)]
col_types_ord <- col_types[match(order_annotation, col_types)]

row_ha <- rowAnnotation(
  CellType = row_types_ord,
  col = list(CellType = group_colors),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  annotation_width = unit(0.5, "cm")
)

col_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  CellType = col_types_ord,
  col = list(CellType = group_colors),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  annotation_height = unit(0.5, "cm")
)


p_cellType_similarity <- Heatmap(
  mat_ord,
  name = "Similarity",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,
  top_annotation = col_ha,
  left_annotation = row_ha,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1)
)

p_cellType_similarity
```

*data_commonBed_similarity_all.csv* and *data_commonBed_similarity_noCensus.csv* contain the sample stage mutation similarity matrices calculated based on common mutated genomic regions (with and without Census genes respectively) and were generated using the functions in `0_pipelineFunctions.R` > pipelines for generating sample stage mutation similarity matrix.

# sample stage mutation similarity
```{r sampleStageMutationSimilarity}
# may spent 2hrs
# generate data_commonBed_similarity_all.csv and data_commonBed_similarity_noCensus.csv 
# using 0_pipelineFunctions.R > # pipelines for generating sample stage mutation similarity matrix

sample_order_keep <- c(
                      "AML1_DX", "AML1_REM", 
                      "AML2_DX", "AML2_REM", "AML2_REL", 
                      "AML3_DX", "AML3_REM", 
                      "AML4_DX", "AML4_REL", 
                      "AML5_DX", "AML5_REM", "AML5_REL", 
                      "AML6_DX", "AML6_REL", 
                      "AML7_REM", "AML7_REL", 
                      "AML8_DX", "AML8_REM", "AML8_REL", 
                      "AML10_DX", "AML10_REM", "AML10_REL",
                      "AML11_DX", "AML11_REM", "AML11_REL", 
                      "AML12_DX", "AML12_REL", 
                      "AML13_DX", "AML13_REL", 
                      "AML15_DX", "AML15_REM", "AML15_REL", 
                      "AML16_DX", "AML16_REM", "AML16_REL", 
                      "AML17_DX", "AML17_REL", 
                      "AML18_DX", "AML18_REL",
                      "AML19_DX", "AML19_REL", 
                      "AML20_DX", "AML20_REM", 
                      "AML21_DX",  "AML21_REM", "AML21_REL", 
                      "AML22_DX", "AML22_REM", "AML22_REL", 
                      "AML24_DX", "AML24_REM", "AML24_REL", 
                      "AML26_DX", "AML26_REM", "AML26_REL", 
                      "AML27_DX", "AML27_REM", "AML27_REL")

data_commonBed_similarity_lenient <- read.csv("../Data/HumanpAML/data_commonBed_similarity_all.csv", row.names = 1)
data_commonBed_similarity_lenient <- data_commonBed_similarity_lenient[sample_order_keep, sample_order_keep]

data_commonBed_similarity_stringent <- read.csv("../Data/HumanpAML/data_commonBed_similarity_noCensus.csv", row.names = 1)
data_commonBed_similarity_stringent <- data_commonBed_similarity_stringent[sample_order_keep, sample_order_keep]

row_prefix <- sapply(rownames(data_commonBed_similarity_lenient), function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][1])
row_suffix <- sapply(rownames(data_commonBed_similarity_lenient), function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][2])
col_prefix <- sapply(colnames(data_commonBed_similarity_lenient), function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][1])
col_suffix <- sapply(colnames(data_commonBed_similarity_lenient), function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][2])

col_anno <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Sample = anno_text(col_prefix, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)),
  scATACStage = col_suffix,
  col = list(scATACStage = c("DX" = "#d9d9d9", "REM" = "#969696", "REL" = "#000000"))
)

row_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  Sample = anno_text(row_prefix, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)),
  scRNAStage = row_suffix,
  col = list(scRNAStage = c("DX" = "#d9d9d9", "REM" = "#969696", "REL" = "#000000")))

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = c(0, 0.33, 0.66, 1),
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

Heatmap(data_commonBed_similarity_lenient,
        top_annotation = col_anno,
        left_annotation = row_anno,
        col = col_fun,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
        width = unit(10, "cm"), height = unit(10, "cm"),
        layer_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
          
          grid.rect(x = x, y = y, width = width, height = height,
                    gp = gpar(col = NA, fill = fill))

          match_prefix <- row_prefix[i] == col_prefix[j]
          if (any(match_prefix)) {
            grid.rect(x = x[match_prefix], y = y[match_prefix],
                      width = width, height = height,
                      gp = gpar(col = "#000000", lwd = 0.1, fill = NA))
          }
        })

Heatmap(data_commonBed_similarity_stringent,
        top_annotation = col_anno,
        left_annotation = row_anno,
        col = col_fun,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6),
        width = unit(10, "cm"), height = unit(10, "cm"),
        layer_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
          
          grid.rect(x = x, y = y, width = width, height = height,
                    gp = gpar(col = NA, fill = fill))

          match_prefix <- row_prefix[i] == col_prefix[j]
          if (any(match_prefix)) {
            grid.rect(x = x[match_prefix], y = y[match_prefix],
                      width = width, height = height,
                      gp = gpar(col = "#000000", lwd = 0.1, fill = NA))
          }
        })
```
*data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_scATAC.rds* , *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA.rds*, and *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA.rds* contain the celltype mutation similarity matrices calculated based on scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq data and were generated using the functions in `0_pipelineFunctions.R` > # pipelines for generating celltype similarity (scRNA vs scATAC), # pipelines for generating celltype similarity (scRNA) and # pipelines for generating celltype similarity (scATAC)

# mutation Celltype similarity (scRNA vs scATAC)
```{r mutationCelltypeSimilarityscRNA_scATAC}
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_scATAC <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_scATAC.rds")
similarity_sum_scRNA_scATAC <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_scATAC)
similarity_mean_scRNA_scATAC <- similarity_sum_scRNA_scATAC / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_scATAC)

breaks <- seq(min(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_scATAC)), 
              max(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_scATAC)), 
              length.out = 4)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = breaks,
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

p_cellType_similarity_Mutation_scRNA_scATAC <- Heatmap(
  as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_scATAC),
  name = "Similarity",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,
  top_annotation = col_ha,
  left_annotation = row_ha,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1)
)

p_cellType_similarity_Mutation_scRNA_scATAC
```

# mutation among celltype similarity merge all stages (scRNA)
```{r mutationCelltypeSimilarityscRNA_allStages}
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA.rds")
similarity_sum_scRNA <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA)
similarity_mean_scRNA <- similarity_sum_scRNA / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA)

breaks <- seq(min(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA)), 
              max(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA)), 
              length.out = 4)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = breaks,
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

Heatmap(
  as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA),
  name = "Similarity",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,
  top_annotation = col_ha,
  left_annotation = row_ha,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1)
)
```

# mutation among celltype similarity merge all stages (scATA)
```{r mutationCelltypeSimilarityscATA_allStages}
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA.rds")
similarity_sum_scATA <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA)
similarity_mean_scATA <- similarity_sum_scATA / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA)
breaks <- seq(min(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA)), 
              max(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA)), 
              length.out = 4)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  breaks = breaks,
  colors = c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)
Heatmap(
  as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA),
  name = "Similarity",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,
  top_annotation = col_ha,
  left_annotation = row_ha,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1)
)
```

# lm between scRNA and scATA mutation celltype similarity
```{r lm}
mat_long_scATA <- reshape2::melt(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA), varnames = c("Row", "Column"), value.name = "Value")
mat_long_scRNA <- reshape2::melt(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA), varnames = c("Row", "Column"), value.name = "Value")

p_correlation_celltypeMutationSimilarity <- ggplot(data = NULL, aes(x = mat_long_scATA$Value, y = mat_long_scRNA$Value)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, color = "#202020") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#ca0020", linetype = "dashed", lwd = 1.2) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  xlab("scATA celltype mutation similarity") +
  ylab("scRNA celltype mutation similarity") +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  annotate("text",
           x = max(mat_long_scRNA$Value) * 0.7,
           y = max(mat_long_scATA$Value) * 0.15,
           label = paste0("r = ", round(cor(mat_long_scATA$Value, mat_long_scRNA$Value), 3)),
           size = 5)

p_correlation_celltypeMutationSimilarity

cor.test(mat_long_scATA$Value, mat_long_scRNA$Value, method = "pearson")
```

*data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_DX.rds*, *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REM.rds* and *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REL.rds* contains cell type mutation similarity across different stages (see `0_pipelineFunctions.Rmd` > # pipelines for generating celltype similarity by stages(scRNA))

# mutation among celltype similarity by stages (scRNA)
```{r mutationCelltypeSimilarityscRNA_byStages}
res_scRNA_order_manu <- c("HSC", "Progenitor",
                          "GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC",
                          "CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Naive", "CD4.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Effector", "NK",
                          "Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte", "Early.Basophil", "Plasma")

cols <- rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_DX <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_DX.rds")
similarity_sum_scRNA_DX <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_DX)
similarity_mean_scRNA_DX <- similarity_sum_scRNA_DX / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_DX)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_DX[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'lower', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REM <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REM.rds")
similarity_sum_scRNA_REM <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REM)
similarity_mean_scRNA_REM <- similarity_sum_scRNA_REM / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REM)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_REM[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'lower', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))


data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REL <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REL.rds")
similarity_sum_scRNA_REL <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REL)
similarity_mean_scRNA_REL <- similarity_sum_scRNA_REL / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_REL)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scRNA_REL[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'lower', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))
```

*data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_DX.rds*, *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REM.rds* and *data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REL.rds* contains cell type mutation similarity across different stages (see `0_pipelineFunctions.Rmd` > # pipelines for generating celltype similarity by stages(scATA))

# mutation among celltype similarity by stages (scATA)
```{r mutationCelltypeSimilarityscATA_byStages}
cols <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_DX <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_DX.rds")
similarity_sum_scATA_DX <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_DX)
similarity_mean_scATA_DX <- similarity_sum_scATA_DX / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_DX)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA_DX[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REM <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REM.rds")
similarity_sum_scATA_REM <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REM)
similarity_mean_scATA_REM <- similarity_sum_scATA_REM / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REM)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA_REM[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REL <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REL.rds")
similarity_sum_scATA_REL <- Reduce("+", data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REL)
similarity_mean_scATA_REL <- similarity_sum_scATA_REL / length(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_REL)
corrplot(as.matrix(similarity_mean_scATA_REL[res_scRNA_order_manu, res_scRNA_order_manu]), order = "original", method = 'color', 
         type = 'upper', col = cols, col.lim = c(0, 1))
```

*data_AML_scATA_mutpeakgene.rds* and *data_AML_scRNA_mutgeneExp.rds* contain the mutation peak-gene associations from scATAC-seq data and mutation gene expression from scRNA-seq data respectively and were generated using the functions in `0_pipelineFunctions.R` > # pipelines for generating mutgeneExp and # pipelines for generating mutpeakgenedata

# stage diff mutations
```{r stageDiffMutations}
AML_ATA_mutPeakGene <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_AML_scATA_mutpeakgene.rds")
AML_RNA_mutExprGene <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/data_AML_scRNA_mutgeneExp.rds")

HSPC = c("HSC", "Progenitor")
Myeloid = c("GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC")
Lymphoid = c("CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Memory", "CD4.Naive", "CD8.Effector", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "NK")
Eryth = c("Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte")

groups <- list(HSPC = HSPC, Myeloid = Myeloid, Lymphoid = Lymphoid, Eryth = Eryth)

AML_ATA_mutPeakGene$mainCelltype <- sapply(AML_ATA_mutPeakGene$Classified_Celltype, function(ct) {
  mainCelltype <- "Other"
  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    if (ct %in% groups[[group_name]]) {
      mainCelltype <- group_name
      break
    }
  }
  return(mainCelltype)
})

AML_RNA_mutExprGene$mainCelltype <- sapply(AML_RNA_mutExprGene$Classified_Celltype, function(ct) {
  mainCelltype <- "Other"
  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    if (ct %in% groups[[group_name]]) {
      mainCelltype <- group_name
      break
    }
  }
  return(mainCelltype)
})

run_fisher_stage <- function(df) {

  # pivot_wider generate wide format mut_status_col
  df_wide <- df %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = mut_status_col,
      values_from = cell_count,
      values_fill = 0
    )

  # exclude stage_id_col and mut_id_col
  status_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df_wide), c("stage_id_col", "mut_id_col"))

  # add missing column if only one status present
  if (length(status_cols) == 1) {
    missing_col <- ifelse(status_cols == "Mut", "WT", "Mut")
    df_wide[[missing_col]] <- 0
    status_cols <- c(status_cols, missing_col)
  }

  # rename status columns to "Mut" and "WT"
  names(df_wide)[match(status_cols, names(df_wide))] <- c("Mut", "WT")

  stages <- unique(df_wide$stage_id_col)

  if (length(stages) < 2) {
    return(tibble(
      stage1 = character(0),
      stage2 = character(0),
      p.value = numeric(0),
      log2_OR = numeric(0),
      estimate = numeric(0),
      table = character(0)
    ))
  }

  purrr::map_df(combn(stages, 2, simplify = FALSE), function(stg) {

    d1 <- dplyr::filter(df_wide, stage_id_col == stg[1])
    d2 <- dplyr::filter(df_wide, stage_id_col == stg[2])

    mut1 <- ifelse(length(d1$Mut) == 0, 0, d1$Mut)
    wt1  <- ifelse(length(d1$WT)  == 0, 0, d1$WT)
    mut2 <- ifelse(length(d2$Mut) == 0, 0, d2$Mut)
    wt2  <- ifelse(length(d2$WT)  == 0, 0, d2$WT)
    
    frac1 <- ifelse((mut1 + wt1) == 0, NA, mut1 / (mut1 + wt1))
    frac2 <- ifelse((mut2 + wt2) == 0, NA, mut2 / (mut2 + wt2))
    
    tab <- matrix(c(mut1, wt1, mut2, wt2), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

    # if all zero, return NA
    if (sum(tab) == 0) {
      return(tibble(
        stage1 = stg[1],
        stage2 = stg[2],
        p.value = NA,
        log2_OR = NA,
        estimate = NA,
        frac_stage1 = NA,
        frac_stage2 = NA,
        table = paste(tab, collapse = ",")
      ))
    }

    ft <- fisher.test(tab)

    tibble(
      stage1 = stg[1],
      stage2 = stg[2],
      p.value = ft$p.value,
      log2_OR = log2(ft$estimate),
      estimate = ft$estimate,
      frac_stage1 = frac1,
      frac_stage2 = frac2,
      table = paste(tab, collapse = ",")
    )
  })
}

AML_scRNA_stageMutCount <- AML_RNA_mutExprGene %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mut_id_col, stage_id_col, mut_status_col, mainCelltype) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(cell_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

AML_scATA_stageMutCount <- AML_ATA_mutPeakGene %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mut_id_col, stage_id_col, mut_status_col, mainCelltype) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(cell_count = n(), .groups = "drop")

res_scRNA <- AML_scRNA_stageMutCount %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mut_id_col, mainCelltype) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ run_fisher_stage(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Tag = paste0(
      gsub(".*_", "", stage1),
      "_vs_",
      gsub(".*_", "", stage2)
    )
  )

res_scATA <- AML_scATA_stageMutCount %>%
  dplyr::group_by(mut_id_col, mainCelltype) %>%
  dplyr::group_modify(~ run_fisher_stage(.x)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Tag = paste0(
      gsub(".*_", "", stage1),
      "_vs_",
      gsub(".*_", "", stage2)
    )
  )

# GO analysis
# Dx_vs_REM
muts_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REM <- res_scRNA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("DX_vs_REM") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scRNA_sig_Dx_vs_REM <- AML_RNA_mutExprGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REM) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbolMut) %>%
  unique()

muts_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REM <- res_scATA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("DX_vs_REM") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REM <- AML_ATA_mutPeakGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REM) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbol) %>%
  unique()

GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REM <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scRNA_sig_Dx_vs_REM,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REM <- as.data.frame(GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REM)

GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REM <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REM,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REM <- as.data.frame(GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REM)

# REM_vs_REL
muts_scRNA_sig_REM_vs_REL <- res_scRNA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("REL_vs_REM") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scRNA_sig_REM_vs_REL <- AML_RNA_mutExprGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scRNA_sig_REM_vs_REL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbolMut) %>%
  unique()

muts_scATA_sig_REM_vs_REL <- res_scATA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("REL_vs_REM") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scATA_sig_REM_vs_REL <- AML_ATA_mutPeakGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scATA_sig_REM_vs_REL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbol) %>%
  unique()

GO_RNA_enrich_REM_vs_REL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scRNA_sig_REM_vs_REL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_RNA_enrich_REM_vs_REL <- as.data.frame(GO_RNA_enrich_REM_vs_REL)

GO_ATA_enrich_REM_vs_REL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scATA_sig_REM_vs_REL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_ATA_enrich_REM_vs_REL <- as.data.frame(GO_ATA_enrich_REM_vs_REL)

# Dx_vs_REL
muts_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REL <- res_scRNA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("DX_vs_REL") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REL <- AML_RNA_mutExprGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbolMut) %>%
  unique()

muts_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REL <- res_scATA %>% dplyr::filter(Tag %in% c("DX_vs_REL") & p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REL <- AML_ATA_mutPeakGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbol) %>%
  unique()

GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scRNA_sig_DX_vs_REL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REL <- as.data.frame(GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REL)

GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scATA_sig_DX_vs_REL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REL <- as.data.frame(GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REL)

# all
muts_scRNA_sig_ALL <- res_scRNA %>% dplyr::filter(p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scRNA_sig_ALL <- AML_RNA_mutExprGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scRNA_sig_ALL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbolMut) %>%
  unique()

muts_scATA_sig_ALL <- res_scATA %>% dplyr::filter(p.value <= 0.05) %>% dplyr::pull(mut_id_col) %>% unique()
gene_scATA_sig_ALL <- AML_ATA_mutPeakGene %>%
  dplyr::filter(mut_id_col %in% muts_scATA_sig_ALL) %>%
  dplyr::pull(geneSymbol) %>%
  unique()

GO_RNA_enrich_ALL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scRNA_sig_ALL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_RNA_enrich_ALL <- as.data.frame(GO_RNA_enrich_ALL)

GO_ATA_enrich_ALL <- enrichGO(gene = gene_scATA_sig_ALL,
                          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                          keyType = "SYMBOL",
                          ont = "BP",
                          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                          pvalueCutoff = 0.5)
GO_ATA_enrich_ALL <- as.data.frame(GO_ATA_enrich_ALL)

# combine
GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REM$Comparison <- "DX_vs_REM"
GO_RNA_enrich_REM_vs_REL$Comparison <- "REM_vs_REL"
GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REL$Comparison <- "DX_vs_REL"
GO_RNA_enrich_ALL$Comparison <- "ALL"
GO_RNA_enrich <- rbind(GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REM, GO_RNA_enrich_REM_vs_REL, GO_RNA_enrich_DX_vs_REL, GO_RNA_enrich_ALL)
GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REM$Comparison <- "DX_vs_REM"
GO_ATA_enrich_REM_vs_REL$Comparison <- "REM_vs_REL"
GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REL$Comparison <- "DX_vs_REL"
GO_ATA_enrich_ALL$Comparison <- "ALL"
GO_ATA_enrich <- rbind(GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REM, GO_ATA_enrich_REM_vs_REL, GO_ATA_enrich_DX_vs_REL, GO_ATA_enrich_ALL)
```

*GO_RNA_enrich.csv* and *GO_ATA_enrich.csv* contain the GO enrichment results for stage differential mutations from scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq data respectively and were generated using the code in the previous chunk

# GO for stage diff mutations
```{r GOstageDiffMutations}
GO_RNA_enrich <- read.csv("../Data/HumanpAML/GO_RNA_enrich.csv")
GO_ATA_enrich <- read.csv("../Data/HumanpAML/GO_ATA_enrich.csv")
# remove duplicated GO terms
GO_ID_RNA_ex <- c("GO:0030099", "GO:0051056")
GO_ID_ATA_ex <- c("GO:0015669", "GO:0015670", "GO:0042744", "GO:0098869", "GO:0019755",
                  "GO:0042743", "GO:0044403")

GO_RNA_enrich_selectAll <- GO_RNA_enrich %>%
  dplyr::filter(Comparison == "ALL") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!ID %in% GO_ID_RNA_ex) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(pvalue) %>% 
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    nlog2p = -log2(pvalue),
    Description = factor(Description, levels = Description[order(nlog2p)]) 
  )

p_GO_RNA_enrich_all_top10 <- ggplot(GO_RNA_enrich_selectAll, aes(x = nlog2p, y = Description)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F8B191") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "-log2(p-value)", y = "GO Term") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

GO_ATA_enrich_selectAll <- GO_ATA_enrich %>%
  dplyr::filter(Comparison == "ALL") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!ID %in% GO_ID_ATA_ex) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(pvalue) %>% 
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    nlog2p = -log2(pvalue),
    Description = factor(Description, levels = Description[order(nlog2p)]) 
  )

p_GO_ATA_enrich_all_top10 <-ggplot(GO_ATA_enrich_selectAll, aes(x = nlog2p, y = Description)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#B9D4E2") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "-log2(p-value)", y = "GO Term") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# combine plot
GO_ATA_enrich_selectAll$Type <- "scATAC"
GO_RNA_enrich_selectAll$Type <- "scRNA"
GO_enrich_selectAll_combined <- rbind(GO_RNA_enrich_selectAll, GO_ATA_enrich_selectAll)
GO_enrich_selectAll_combined <- GO_enrich_selectAll_combined %>%
  arrange(Type, nlog2p) %>%
  group_by(Type) %>%
  mutate(
    Description = factor(Description, levels = unique(Description[order(nlog2p)]))
  )

p_GO_combined <- ggplot(GO_enrich_selectAll_combined,
                        aes(x = nlog2p, y = Description, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ Type, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("scRNA" = "#F8B191", "scATAC" = "#B9D4E2")) +
  labs(x = "-log2(p-value)", y = "GO Term") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

p_GO_RNA_enrich_all_top10
p_GO_ATA_enrich_all_top10
p_GO_combined
```

# percentage celltype per sample across stages
```{r percentageCelltypePerSampleAcrossStages}
AML_RNA_meta_merge <- AML_scRNA_meta
AML_ATA_meta_merge <- AML_scATA_meta

AML_ATA_meta_merge$SampleID <- sub("_.*", "", AML_ATA_meta_merge$Sample)

rownames(AML_ATA_meta_merge) <- sub("^AML[0-9]+\\.", "", rownames(AML_ATA_meta_merge))

colnames(AML_ATA_meta_merge) <- c("Library_ID", "TSSEnrichment", "ReadsInTSS", "ReadsInPromoter", 
                "ReadsInBlacklist", "PromoterRatio", "PassQC", "NucleosomeRatio", 
                "nMultiFrags", "nMonoFrags", "nFrags", "nDiFrags", "BlacklistRatio", 
                "DoubletScore", "DoubletEnrichment", "Clusters", "ReadsInPeaks", 
                "FRIP", "predictedCell_Un", "Classified_Celltype", 
                "predictedScore_Un", "predictedCell_RNAQun", "Lambo_et_al_ID")


# ATA
AML_ATA_celltype_percentage <- AML_ATA_meta_merge %>%
  dplyr::count(Library_ID, Classified_Celltype, name = "cell_count") %>%  
  dplyr::group_by(Library_ID) %>%                                       
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_cells = sum(cell_count),                                
    percentage  = cell_count / total_cells * 100
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


AML_RNA_celltype_percentage <- AML_RNA_meta_merge %>%
  dplyr::count(Library_ID, Classified_Celltype, name = "cell_count") %>%  
  dplyr::group_by(Library_ID) %>%                                       
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_cells = sum(cell_count),                                
    percentage  = cell_count / total_cells * 100
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


cellTypes_order <- c(
  "HSC", "Progenitor", "GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC",
```
