```{r percentageCelltypePerSampleAcrossStages}
  "CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Memory", "CD4.Naive", "CD8.Effector", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "NK",
  "Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte", "Unkwnown"
)

AML_RNA_celltype_percentage$Classified_Celltype <- factor(
  AML_RNA_celltype_percentage$Classified_Celltype,
  levels = cellTypes_order
)

AML_ATA_celltype_percentage$Classified_Celltype <- factor(
  AML_ATA_celltype_percentage$Classified_Celltype,
  levels = cellTypes_order
)


ggplot(AML_RNA_celltype_percentage, aes(x = Classified_Celltype, y = Library_ID, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(name = "Percentage", low = "white", high = "red") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

ggplot(AML_ATA_celltype_percentage, aes(x = Classified_Celltype, y = Library_ID, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(name = "Percentage", low = "white", high = "red") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )


# main
HSPC = c("HSC", "Progenitor")
Myeloid = c("GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC")
Lymphoid = c("CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Memory", "CD4.Naive", "CD8.Effector", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "NK")
Eryth = c("Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte")

AML_ATA_meta_merge_main <- AML_ATA_meta_merge %>%
  mutate(
    Main_celltype = case_when(
      Classified_Celltype %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Eryth ~ "Eryth",
      TRUE ~ "Other"  # Other
    )
  )


AML_RNA_meta_merge_main <- AML_RNA_meta_merge %>%
  mutate(
    Main_celltype = case_when(
      Classified_Celltype %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Eryth ~ "Eryth",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage <- AML_ATA_meta_merge_main %>%
  dplyr::count(Library_ID, Main_celltype, name = "cell_count") %>%  
  dplyr::group_by(Library_ID) %>%                                       
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_cells = sum(cell_count),                                
    percentage  = cell_count / total_cells * 100
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage <- AML_RNA_meta_merge_main %>%
  dplyr::count(Library_ID, Main_celltype, name = "cell_count") %>%  
  dplyr::group_by(Library_ID) %>%                                       
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_cells = sum(cell_count),                                
    percentage  = cell_count / total_cells * 100
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

mainCellTypes_order <- c("HSPC", "Myeloid", "Lymphoid", "Eryth", "Other")
AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage$Main_celltype <- factor(
  AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage$Main_celltype,
  levels = mainCellTypes_order
)
AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage$Main_celltype <- factor(
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage$Main_celltype,
  levels = mainCellTypes_order
)

ggplot(AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage, aes(x = Main_celltype, y = Library_ID, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(name = "Percentage", low = "white", high = "blue") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )
ggplot(AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage, aes(x = Main_celltype, y = Library_ID, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient(name = "Percentage", low = "white", high = "blue") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Main cell type proportion barplot
AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data <- AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage %>% mutate(Main_celltype = ifelse(is.na(Main_celltype), "Unknown", as.character(Main_celltype)))
AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data <- AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage %>% mutate(Main_celltype = ifelse(is.na(Main_celltype), "Unknown", as.character(Main_celltype)))

# keep DX and REL pair samples only
# RNA 
sample_pair_RNA <- c("AML10", "AML11", "AML12", "AML13", "AML15", "AML16", 
                     "AML17", "AML18", "AML19", "AML21", "AML22", "AML23",
                     "AML24", "AML25", "AML26", "AML27", "AML2", "AML4",
                     "AML5", "AML6", "AML8", "AML9")

sample_pair_ATA <- c("AML10", "AML11", "AML12", "AML13", "AML15", "AML16", "AML17", "AML18",
                     "AML19", "AML21", "AML22", "AML24", "AML25", "AML26",
                     "AML27", "AML2", "AML4", "AML5", "AML6", "AML8")

sample_pair_RNA_ATA <- intersect(sample_pair_RNA, sample_pair_ATA)


AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered <- AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(gsub("_.*", "", Library_ID) %in% sample_pair_RNA_ATA) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Main_celltype != "Other") %>%
  tidyr::separate(col = Library_ID, into = c("Sample", "Stage"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Stage %in% c("DX", "REL"))

AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Stage <- factor(
  AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Stage,
  levels = c("DX", "REL")
)


# ATA
sample_pair_ATA <- c("AML10", "AML11", "AML12", "AML13", "AML15", "AML16", "AML17", "AML18",
                     "AML19", "AML21", "AML22", "AML24", "AML25", "AML26",
                     "AML27", "AML2", "AML4", "AML5", "AML6", "AML8")

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered <- AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(gsub("_.*", "", Library_ID) %in% sample_pair_RNA_ATA) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Main_celltype != "Other") %>%
  tidyr::separate(col = Library_ID, into = c("Sample", "Stage"), sep = "_", remove = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Stage %in% c("DX", "REL"))

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Stage <- factor(
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Stage,
  levels = c("DX", "REL")
)

AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype <- factor(
  AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype,
  levels = c("HSPC", "Myeloid", "Lymphoid", "Eryth")
)

RNA_sample_level <- c("AML4", "AML16",  "AML11", "AML17", "AML18", "AML24", 
    "AML10", "AML12", "AML13", "AML15", "AML19", "AML21", "AML22", "AML25", 
    "AML26", "AML27", "AML2", "AML5", "AML6", "AML8")

AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Sample <- factor(
  AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Sample,
  levels = RNA_sample_level
)

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered <-
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered %>%
  dplyr::add_row(
    Library_ID   = "AML11_REL",
    Sample       = "AML11",
    Stage        = "REL",
    Main_celltype= "Eryth",
    cell_count   = 0L,
    total_cells  = 3686L,
    percentage   = 0
  )

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype <- factor(
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype,
  levels = c("HSPC", "Myeloid", "Lymphoid", "Eryth")
)

ATA_sample_level <- c("AML4",  "AML16", "AML11", "AML17", "AML18", "AML24", 
                      "AML10", "AML12", "AML13", "AML15", "AML19", "AML21", "AML22", 
                      "AML25", "AML26", "AML27", "AML2", "AML5", 
                      "AML6", "AML8")

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Sample <- factor(
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Sample,
  levels = ATA_sample_level
)

myColors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)

p_RNA_percentage <- ggplot(AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered,
  aes(x = Main_celltype, y = Sample, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Stage) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = RNA_sample_level) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = rev(myColors)[50:100], name = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

p_ATA_percentage <- ggplot(AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered,
  aes(x = Main_celltype, y = Sample, fill = percentage)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Stage) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = ATA_sample_level) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(colors = myColors[50:100], name = "Percentage") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

p_RNA_percentage
p_ATA_percentage

AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Tag <- paste(AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Library_ID, 
                                                           AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype,
                                                           sep = "_")

AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Tag <- paste(AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Library_ID,
                                                          AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered$Main_celltype,
                                                          sep = "_")

# merge
merged_percentage_data <- merge(
  AML_RNA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered,
  AML_ATA_Maincelltype_percentage_data_filtered,
  by = "Tag",
  suffixes = c("_RNA", "_ATA")
)

p_similarity_celltypePercentage <- ggplot(data = merged_percentage_data, 
       aes(x = percentage_ATA, y = percentage_RNA)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, color = "#202020") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#ca0020", linetype = "dashed", size = 1.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("scATA celltype percentage") +
  ylab("scRNA celltype percentage") +
  xlim(0, 100) + ylim(0, 100) +
  annotate("text", x = 10, y = 90,
           label = paste0("r = ", round(cor(merged_percentage_data$percentage_ATA, merged_percentage_data$percentage_RNA), 3)),
           size = 5)

p_similarity_celltypePercentage

cor.test(merged_percentage_data$percentage_ATA, merged_percentage_data$percentage_RNA, method = "pearson")
```

*p8_RDS_GIM2_sampleID_M.rds* and *p8_RDS_MM2_sampleID_M.rds* contain the GeneIntegrationMatrix and MotifMatrix data for transcrption factor lineage analysis respectively and were generated using `0_pipelineFunctions.Rmd` > # pipelines for processing scATAC-seq data and # pipelines for trajectory analysis of scATAC-seq data

GIM, Motif and geneExp data can be accessed at zenodo ()

# transcrption factor lineage analysis
```{r TFlineageAnalysis, eval=FALSE}
plot_list_lineageSwitching <- function(GIMPath, MMPath, colOrder = NA){
  message("Function to plot lineage switching heatmaps for GIM and MM data.")
  if (all(is.na(colOrder))) {
    colOrder <- seq_len(ncol(GIM_data_mat))
  }
  
  message("Reading GIM data from: ", GIMPath)
  GIM_data <- readRDS(GIMPath)
  GIM_data_mat <- GIM_data$assayMat
  #GIM_data_mat <- pmin(pmax(GIM_data_mat, -1.5), 1.5)
  rownames(GIM_data_mat) <- sub("chr[0-9XY]+:", "", rownames(GIM_data_mat))
  colnames(GIM_data_mat) <- paste(GIM_data$assayColData$label, 1:length(GIM_data$assayColData$label), sep = "_")
  message("Reading MM data from: ", MMPath)
  MM_data <- readRDS(MMPath)
  MM_data_mat <- MM_data$assayMat
  #MM_data_mat <- pmin(pmax(MM_data_mat, -1.5), 1.5)
  rownames(MM_data_mat) <-  sub("^z:([A-Za-z0-9]+)_.*$", "\\1", rownames(MM_data_mat))
  colnames(MM_data_mat) <- paste(MM_data$assayColData$label, 1:length(MM_data$assayColData$label), sep = "_")
  
  final_row_order <- rownames(GIM_data_mat)[row_order(Heatmap(GIM_data_mat))]
  
  GIM_data_mat <- GIM_data_mat[, colOrder]
  MM_data_mat <- MM_data_mat[, colOrder]
  
  col_GIM_stage <- sub("^.*_([^_]+)_.*$", "\\1", colnames(GIM_data_mat))
  ha_col <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    SampleStage = col_GIM_stage,
    col = list(
      SampleStage = c(
        "DX"  = "#33a02c",
        "REL" = "#E31A1C"
      )
    )
  )
  
  ht_GIM_final <- Heatmap(GIM_data_mat[final_row_order,],
                 cluster_rows = FALSE,
                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                 top_annotation = ha_col,
                 col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])
  
  ht_MM_final <- Heatmap(MM_data_mat[final_row_order,],
                 cluster_rows = FALSE,
                 cluster_columns = FALSE,
                 top_annotation = ha_col,
                 col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)[50:100])

  return(list(ht_GIM_final = ht_GIM_final,
              ht_MM_final = ht_MM_final,
              GIM_mat = GIM_data_mat,
              MM_mat = MM_data_mat,
              genes = final_row_order))
}

rowMeans_no_outlier <- function(mat) {
  apply(mat, 1, function(x) {
    q <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
    iqr <- q[2] - q[1]
    x[x >= (q[1] - 1.5 * iqr) & x <= (q[2] + 1.5 * iqr)] |> 
      mean(na.rm = TRUE)
  })
}


generate_marker_matrix <- function(marker_gene, matMatrix, iteration_times = 1000, iteration_sizef  = 0.5, dx_pattern  = "DX", rel_pattern = "REL"){
  matMatrix_marker <- matMatrix[marker_gene, ]
  cells_DX  <- grep(dx_pattern,  colnames(matMatrix_marker), value = TRUE)
  cells_REL <- grep(rel_pattern, colnames(matMatrix_marker), value = TRUE)
  
  set.seed(2025)
  iteration_DX <- list()
  iteration_REL <- list()
  for (i in 1:iteration_times) {
    sampled_cells_DX <- sample(cells_DX, size = round(length(cells_DX) * iteration_sizef), replace = TRUE)
    iteration_DX[[i]] <- rowMeans_no_outlier(matMatrix_marker[,sampled_cells_DX, drop = FALSE])
    sampled_cells_REL <- sample(cells_REL, size = round(length(cells_REL) * iteration_sizef), replace = TRUE)
    iteration_REL[[i]] <- rowMeans_no_outlier(matMatrix_marker[,sampled_cells_REL, drop = FALSE])
  }
  
  return(list(DX = iteration_DX,
              REL = iteration_REL))
}

range_scale <- function(x, min_val = -1.5, max_val = 1.5) {
  x_min <- min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max <- max(x, na.rm = TRUE)

  (x - x_min) / (x_max - x_min) * (max_val - min_val) + min_val
}


# paths
GIM_AML4_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML4_M.rds"
MM_AML4_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML4_M.rds"
GIM_AML16_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML16_M.rds"
MM_AML16_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML16_M.rds"
GIM_AML11_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML18_M.rds"
MM_AML11_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML18_M.rds"
GIM_AML17_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML17_M.rds"
MM_AML17_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML17_M.rds"
GIM_AML18_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML18_M.rds"
MM_AML18_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML18_M.rds"
GIM_AML24_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_GIM2_AML24_M.rds"
MM_AML24_Path <- "../Data/HumanpAML/p8_RDS_MM2_AML24_M.rds"

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML4 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML4_Path, MM_AML4_Path, colOrderQ)

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML16 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML16_Path, MM_AML16_Path, colOrderQ)

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML11 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML11_Path, MM_AML11_Path, colOrderQ)

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML17 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML17_Path, MM_AML17_Path, colOrderQ)

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML18 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML18_Path, MM_AML18_Path, colOrderQ)

colOrderQ <- c(1:100)
lineage_AML24 <- plot_list_lineageSwitching(GIM_AML24_Path, MM_AML24_Path, colOrderQ)

lineage_AML4$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML4$ht_MM_final

lineage_AML16$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML16$ht_MM_final

lineage_AML11$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML11$ht_MM_final

lineage_AML17$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML17$ht_MM_final

lineage_AML18$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML18$ht_MM_final

lineage_AML24$ht_GIM_final
lineage_AML24$ht_MM_final


# select genes showing lineage switching
lineageSwitching_genes_H <-unique(c("LMO2", "RUNX1", "GATA2", "TAL1", "ERG", "FLI1",
                                    "HOXA9"))

lineageSwitching_genes_M <- unique(c("STAT2", "CREM", "SPI1", "KLF2", "BACH1", "ATF4", "IRF1", "ATF3",
    "JDP2", "NR4A1", "KLF3", "BHLHE40", "CEBPD", "NR4A3", "KLF4", "NR4A2", "DDIT3", "RXRA", "REL",
    "MAFF", "CEBPA", "NFKB1", "TFEB", "CEBPB", "KLF11", "NR1D2", "JUNB", "ETV3", "CREB5", "FOSL2",
    "ELF4", "RARA", "FOS", "KLF13", "JUN", "MLX", "NFIL3", "FOSB"))

lineageSwitching_genes_L <- unique(c("USF2", "PAX5", "POU2F1", "IRF7", "XBP1", "FOXO1", "GFI1", "TCF4",
    "FOXP1", "ETS1", "ID3", "MEF2C", "FOXN3", "IRF4", "EBF1", "TCF7L2", "IRF2", "TCFL5", "TCF3", "LEF1",
    "SMARCC2", "KLF6", "TCF12", "IRF3", "SP3"))

HSC_marker <- c("HOPX", "SPINK2")
Progenitor_marker <- c("CD34", "NUCB2", "C1QTNF4","CDK6", "IGFBP7")
GMP_Myeloid_marker <- c("PRTN3", "ELANE", "MPO", "AZU1", "CTSG")
Monocyte_Myeloid_marker <- c("TYROBP", "FCN1", "VCAN")
B_Lymphoid_marker <- c("CD79A", "CD19", "DNTT", "VPREB3")
T_Lymphoid_marker <- c("IL7R", "LTB", "CD7")

tf_genes <- c(lineageSwitching_genes_H, lineageSwitching_genes_M, lineageSwitching_genes_L)
marker_genes <- c(HSC_marker, Progenitor_marker, GMP_Myeloid_marker, Monocyte_Myeloid_marker,
                  B_Lymphoid_marker, T_Lymphoid_marker)

gene_lineage <- data.frame(
  Gene = c(lineageSwitching_genes_H, lineageSwitching_genes_M, lineageSwitching_genes_L, HSC_marker, Progenitor_marker,
           GMP_Myeloid_marker, Monocyte_Myeloid_marker, B_Lymphoid_marker, T_Lymphoid_marker),
  Lineage = c(rep("HSPC_TF", length(lineageSwitching_genes_H)),
              rep("Myeloid_TF", length(lineageSwitching_genes_M)),
              rep("Lymphoid_TF", length(lineageSwitching_genes_L)),
              rep("HSC_Marker", length(HSC_marker)),
              rep("Progenitor_Marker", length(Progenitor_marker)),
              rep("Myeloid_Marker_GMP", length(GMP_Myeloid_marker)),
              rep("Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte", length(Monocyte_Myeloid_marker)),
              rep("Lymphoid_Marker_B", length(B_Lymphoid_marker)),
              rep("Lymphoid_Marker_T", length(T_Lymphoid_marker)))
)

lineageSwitching_genes <- unique(c(lineageSwitching_genes_H, lineageSwitching_genes_M, lineageSwitching_genes_L, 
                                   HSC_marker, Progenitor_marker, GMP_Myeloid_marker,
           Monocyte_Myeloid_marker, B_Lymphoid_marker, T_Lymphoid_marker))


include_genes <- c(lineageSwitching_genes_H, "NR4A1", "CEBPA", "KLF13", "NFIL3", "PAX5", "POU2F1", "TCF4", 
                   "MEF2C", "EBF1", "TCFL5", "TCF3", "LEF1", "IRF3", "PRTN3", 
                   "ELANE", "MPO", "AZU1", "CTSG", "TYROBP", "IGLL1", "CD79A", 
                   "DNTT", "VPREB3", "IL7R", "LTB", marker_genes)

lineageSwitching_genes <- lineageSwitching_genes[which(lineageSwitching_genes %in% include_genes)]

sample_names_lineage <- c("AML8", "AML6", "AML5", "AML2", "AML27", "AML26", 
                          "AML25", "AML22", "AML21", "AML19", "AML15", "AML13", 
                          "AML12", "AML10", "AML24", "AML18", "AML17", "AML11", 
                          "AML16", "AML4")

modality_names_lineage <- c("RNA", "ATA")
stage_names_lineage <- c("DX", "REL")
iteration_times <- 100
# lineage switching gene matrix
colnames_lineageSwitching_matrix <- unlist(
  lapply(sample_names_lineage, function(sample) {
    unlist(
      lapply(modality_names_lineage, function(modality) {
        unlist(
          lapply(stage_names_lineage, function(stage) {
            paste(sample, stage, 1:iteration_times, modality, sep = "_")
          })
        )
      })
    )
  })
)

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix <- as.data.frame(
  matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(lineageSwitching_genes),
    ncol = length(colnames_lineageSwitching_matrix)
  )
)

rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) <- lineageSwitching_genes
colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) <- colnames_lineageSwitching_matrix

for (sample in sample_names_lineage) {
  ATA_motif_path <- paste0("../Data/HumanpAML/", sample, "_cellMotif.rds")
  RNA_motif_path <- paste0("../Data/HumanpAML/", sample, "_geneExp.rds")
  ATA_motif <- readRDS(ATA_motif_path)
  rownames(ATA_motif) <- sub("_.*$", "", rownames(ATA_motif))
  RNA_exp <- readRDS(RNA_motif_path)
  for (gene in lineageSwitching_genes) {
    message("Processing gene: ", gene, " in sample: ", sample)
    # ATA
    message("  Processing ATA data...")
    res_ATA <- generate_marker_matrix(gene, ATA_motif, iteration_times = iteration_times, iteration_sizef  = 0.5, dx_pattern  = "DX", rel_pattern = "REL")
    col_ATA <- paste(sample, c(paste(rep(stage_names_lineage[1], iteration_times), 1:iteration_times, sep = "_"), paste(rep(stage_names_lineage[2], iteration_times), 1:iteration_times, sep = "_")), "ATA", sep = "_")
    col_ATA_DX <- grep("DX", col_ATA, value = TRUE)
    col_ATA_REL <- grep("REL", col_ATA, value = TRUE)
    ATA_value <- c(unlist(res_ATA$DX), unlist(res_ATA$REL))
    ATA_value_scaled <- range_scale(ATA_value, min_val = -1.5, max_val = 1.5)
    lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[gene, col_ATA_DX] <- ATA_value_scaled[1:iteration_times]
    lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[gene, col_ATA_REL] <- ATA_value_scaled[(iteration_times + 1):(2 * iteration_times)]
    # RNA
    message("  Processing RNA data...")
    res_RNA <- generate_marker_matrix(gene, RNA_exp, iteration_times = iteration_times, iteration_sizef  = 0.5, dx_pattern  = "DX", rel_pattern = "REL")
    col_RNA <- paste(sample, c(paste(rep(stage_names_lineage[1], iteration_times), 1:iteration_times, sep = "_"), paste(rep(stage_names_lineage[2], iteration_times), 1:iteration_times, sep = "_")), "RNA", sep = "_")
    col_RNA_DX <- grep("DX", col_RNA, value = TRUE)
    col_RNA_REL <- grep("REL", col_RNA, value = TRUE)
    RNA_value <- c(unlist(res_RNA$DX), unlist(res_RNA$REL))
    RNA_value_scaled <- range_scale(RNA_value, min_val = -1.5, max_val = 1.5)
    lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[gene, col_RNA_DX] <- RNA_value_scaled[1:iteration_times]
    lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[gene, col_RNA_REL] <- RNA_value_scaled[(iteration_times + 1):(2 * iteration_times)]
  }
}

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_rmna <- na.omit(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix)

gene_lineage <- gene_lineage[gene_lineage$Gene %in% include_genes, ]

ha_row <- rowAnnotation(
  Lineage = gene_lineage$Lineage,
  col = list(
    Lineage = c(
      HSPC_TF  = "#662506",
      HSC_Marker = "#cc4c02",
      Progenitor_Marker = "#fec44f",
      Myeloid_TF  = "#053061",
      Myeloid_Marker_GMP = "#2166AC",
      Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte = "#4393C3",
      Lymphoid_TF = "#00441b",
      Lymphoid_Marker_B = "#238b45",
      Lymphoid_Marker_T = "#66c2a4"
    )
  )
)

Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])

#saveRDS(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix, "../Data/AML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_matrix.rds")
#saveRDS(gene_lineage, "../Data/AML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_meta.rds")
```

*AML_lineageSwitching_gene_matrix.rds* and *AML_lineageSwitching_gene_meta.rds* contain the lineage switching gene matrix and gene lineage metadata used for plotting transcription factor lineage plots and were generated using the code above.

# transcription factor lineage plots
```{r TFlineagePlots}
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_matrix.rds")
gene_lineage <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_meta.rds")
gene_lineage_tf <- gene_lineage[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("Myeloid_TF", "Lymphoid_TF"),]
gene_lineage_marker <- gene_lineage[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("HSC_Marker", "Progenitor_Marker",
                                                            "Myeloid_Marker_GMP", "Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte",
                                                            "Lymphoid_Marker_B", "Lymphoid_Marker_T"),]

gene_tf <- gene_lineage$Gene[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("Myeloid_TF", "Lymphoid_TF")]
gene_marker <- gene_lineage$Gene[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("HSC_Marker", "Progenitor_Marker",
                                                            "Myeloid_Marker_GMP", "Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte",
                                                            "Lymphoid_Marker_B", "Lymphoid_Marker_T")]

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) %in% gene_tf, ]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_RNA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf[, grep("RNA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf))]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_ATA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf[, grep("ATA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf))]

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) %in% gene_marker, ]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker_RNA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker[, grep("RNA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker))]

ha_row_tf <- rowAnnotation(
  Lineage = gene_lineage_tf$Lineage,
  col = list(
    Lineage = c(
      Myeloid_TF  = "#053061",
      Lymphoid_TF = "#00441b"
    )
  )
)

ha_row_marker <- rowAnnotation(
  Lineage = gene_lineage_marker$Lineage,
  col = list(
    Lineage = c(
      HSC_Marker = "#7f2704",
      Progenitor_Marker = "#d94801",
      Myeloid_Marker_GMP = "#2166AC",
      Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte = "#4393C3",
      Lymphoid_Marker_B = "#238b45",
      Lymphoid_Marker_T = "#66c2a4"
    )
  )
)

TF_motif_order_byletter <- c("CEBPA", "KLF13", "NFIL3", "NR4A1", "EBF1", "IRF3",
                             "LEF1", "MEF2C", "PAX5", "POU2F1", "TCF3", "TCF4", "TCFL5")

marker_gene_order_byletter <- c("C1QTNF4", "CD34", "CDK6", "HOPX", "IGFBP7", "NUCB2", "SPINK2", 
                                "AZU1", "CTSG", "ELANE", "FCN1", "MPO", "PRTN3", "TYROBP", "VCAN", 
                                "CD19", "CD79A", "DNTT", "IL7R", "LTB", "VPREB3", "CD7")

# TF_EXP
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_RNA[TF_motif_order_byletter,],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])

# TF_ATA
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_ATA[TF_motif_order_byletter, ],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)[50:100])


# Marker_EXP
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker_RNA[marker_gene_order_byletter, ],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_marker,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])
```
# merge figures for TF lineage switching
```{r mergeTFLineageSwitching}
iteration_times <- 100
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_matrix.rds")
gene_lineage <- readRDS("../Data/HumanpAML/AML_lineageSwitching_gene_meta.rds")
gene_lineage_tf <- gene_lineage[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("Myeloid_TF", "Lymphoid_TF"),]
gene_lineage_marker <- gene_lineage[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("HSC_Marker", "Progenitor_Marker",
                                                            "Myeloid_Marker_GMP", "Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte",
                                                            "Lymphoid_Marker_B", "Lymphoid_Marker_T"),]

gene_tf <- gene_lineage$Gene[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("Myeloid_TF", "Lymphoid_TF")]
gene_marker <- gene_lineage$Gene[gene_lineage$Lineage %in% c("HSC_Marker", "Progenitor_Marker",
                                                            "Myeloid_Marker_GMP", "Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte",
                                                            "Lymphoid_Marker_B", "Lymphoid_Marker_T")]

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) %in% gene_tf, ]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_RNA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf[, grep("RNA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf))]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_ATA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf[, grep("ATA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf))]

lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) %in% gene_marker, ]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker_RNA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker[, grep("RNA", colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker))]

# --------
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix[rownames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix) %in% c("MEF2C", "CEBPA"),]
col_info <- data.frame(col = colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA))

col_info$sample <- sub("_(DX|REL)_.*", "", col_info$col)
col_info$stage  <- sub(".*_(DX|REL)_.*", "\\1", col_info$col)

col_info$stage <- factor(col_info$stage, levels = c("DX", "REL"))
col_info <- col_info[order(col_info$sample, col_info$stage), ]
lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA_sorted <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA[, col_info$col]

colnames_df <- data.frame(col = colnames(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA_sorted))

colnames_df$sample <- sub("_(DX|REL)_.*", "", colnames_df$col)
colnames_df$stage  <- sub(".*_(DX|REL)_.*", "\\1", colnames_df$col)
colnames_df$mod    <- sub(".*_(RNA|ATA)$", "\\1", colnames_df$col)
colnames_df$iter   <- as.numeric(sub(".*_(DX|REL)_([0-9]+)_.*", "\\2", colnames_df$col))

rownames(colnames_df) <- colnames_df$col
ann_colors <- list(
  stage = c(DX = "#1f78b4", REL = "#e31a1c"),
  mod   = c(RNA = "#33a02c", ATA = "#ff7f00")
)

pheatmap(
  lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA_sorted,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  annotation_col = colnames_df[, c("sample", "stage", "mod")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  scale = "row"
)

samples_unique <- unique(colnames_df$sample)
gene_mef2c_cebpa <- c("MEF2C", "CEBPA")
allStages <- c("DX", "REL")
colnames_sample_gene_dxrel <- c(paste0("MEF2C", "_DX_", 1:iteration_times, "_RNA"), paste0("MEF2C", "_REL_", 1:iteration_times, "_RNA"),
                                paste0("MEF2C", "_DX_", 1:iteration_times, "_ATA"), paste0("MEF2C", "_REL_", 1:iteration_times, "_ATA"),
                                paste0("CEBPA", "_DX_", 1:iteration_times, "_RNA"), paste0("CEBPA", "_REL_", 1:iteration_times, "_RNA"),
                                paste0("CEBPA", "_DX_", 1:iteration_times, "_ATA"), paste0("CEBPA", "_REL_", 1:iteration_times, "_ATA"))
sample_gene_dxrel <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(samples_unique), ncol = length(colnames_sample_gene_dxrel)))
rownames(sample_gene_dxrel) <- samples_unique 
colnames(sample_gene_dxrel) <- colnames_sample_gene_dxrel

for (stage in allStages){
  for (sample in samples_unique){
    for (gene in gene_mef2c_cebpa){
      for (iter_n in 1:iteration_times){
        # ori
        col_ori_RNA <- paste(sample, stage, iter_n, "RNA", sep = "_")
        col_ori_ATA <- paste(sample, stage, iter_n, "ATA", sep = "_")
        print(col_ori_RNA)
        item_ori_RNA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA_sorted[gene, col_ori_RNA]
        item_ori_ATA <- lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_MEF2C_CEBPA_sorted[gene, col_ori_ATA]
        # new
        col_new_RNA <- paste(gene, stage, iter_n, "RNA", sep = "_")
        col_new_ATA <- paste(gene, stage, iter_n, "ATA", sep = "_")
        sample_gene_dxrel[sample, col_new_RNA] <- item_ori_RNA
        sample_gene_dxrel[sample, col_new_ATA] <- item_ori_ATA
      }
    }
  }
}

sample_gene_dxrel_RNA <- sample_gene_dxrel[,grep("RNA", colnames(sample_gene_dxrel), value = T)]
sample_gene_dxrel_ATA <- sample_gene_dxrel[,grep("ATA", colnames(sample_gene_dxrel), value = T)]
samples_order <- c("AML24", "AML19", "AML11", "AML17", "AML18", "AML2", "AML15",
                   "AML5", "AML10", "AML12", "AML27", "AML6", "AML4", "AML8",
                   "AML16", "AML21", "AML22", "AML25", "AML26", "AML13")

Heatmap(sample_gene_dxrel,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])


Heatmap(sample_gene_dxrel_RNA[samples_order,],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        #left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])

Heatmap(sample_gene_dxrel_ATA[samples_order,],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        #left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)[50:100])
# --------

ha_row_tf <- rowAnnotation(
  Lineage = gene_lineage_tf$Lineage,
  col = list(
    Lineage = c(
      Myeloid_TF  = "#053061",
      Lymphoid_TF = "#00441b"
    )
  )
)

ha_row_marker <- rowAnnotation(
  Lineage = gene_lineage_marker$Lineage,
  col = list(
    Lineage = c(
      HSC_Marker = "#7f2704",
      Progenitor_Marker = "#d94801",
      Myeloid_Marker_GMP = "#2166AC",
      Myeloid_Marker_Monocyte = "#4393C3",
      Lymphoid_Marker_B = "#238b45",
      Lymphoid_Marker_T = "#66c2a4"
    )
  )
)

TF_motif_order_byletter <- c("CEBPA", "KLF13", "NFIL3", "NR4A1", "EBF1", "IRF3",
                             "LEF1", "MEF2C", "PAX5", "POU2F1", "TCF3", "TCF4", "TCFL5")

marker_gene_order_byletter <- c("C1QTNF4", "CD34", "CDK6", "HOPX", "IGFBP7", "NUCB2", "SPINK2", 
                                "AZU1", "CTSG", "ELANE", "FCN1", "MPO", "PRTN3", "TYROBP", "VCAN", 
                                "CD19", "CD79A", "DNTT", "IL7R", "LTB", "VPREB3", "CD7")

# TF_EXP
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_RNA[TF_motif_order_byletter,],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])

# TF_ATA
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_tf_ATA[TF_motif_order_byletter, ],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_tf,
        col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)[50:100])


# Marker_EXP
Heatmap(lineageSwitching_gene_matrix_marker_RNA[marker_gene_order_byletter, ],
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        left_annotation = ha_row_marker,
        col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100))[50:100])
```

# mutation Similarity DXREL for lineage switching
```{r mutationSimilarityDXREL}
get_scRNA_mutSites_byStages <- function(CSM_list, meta_data){
  common_sample_pairs <- unique(names(CSM_list))
  ct_forComparision <- unique(meta_data$Classified_Celltype)
  ct_forComparision <- setdiff(ct_forComparision, "Unknown")
  print(ct_forComparision)
  data_mutationCelltype_sites_list <- list()
  for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
    message(sample)
    csm_tmp <- CSM_list[[sample]]
    for (i in ct_forComparision){
      ct_i <- i
      cell_barcode_meta_i <- meta_data %>% 
        mutate(CellTag = rownames(.)) %>%  
        dplyr::filter(Classified_Celltype == ct_i & Library_ID == sample) %>%
        pull(CellTag)
      cell_barcode_csm_format_all_i <- rownames(csm_tmp) %>%
        sub("_L[0-9]+_", "_", .) %>%
        sub("_(.*)_", "_\\1.", .) %>%
        paste0(.,"-1") %>%
        sub("\\.", "#", x = .)
      cell_barcode_csm_selected_i <- rownames(csm_tmp)[cell_barcode_csm_format_all_i %in% cell_barcode_meta_i]
      mut_site_i <- retriveLocsByCells(csm_tmp, cell_barcode_csm_selected_i)$Mut
      if (length(cell_barcode_meta_i) <= 10){
        mut_site_i <- "Empty"
      }
      data_mutationCelltype_sites_list[[sample]][[ct_i]] <- mut_site_i
    }
  }
  return(data_mutationCelltype_sites_list)
}

get_scATA_mutSites_byStages <- function(CSM_list, meta_data){
  common_sample_pairs <- unique(names(CSM_list))
  ct_forComparision <- unique(meta_data$Classified_Celltype)
  ct_forComparision <- setdiff(ct_forComparision, "Unknown")
  print(ct_forComparision)
  data_mutationCelltype_sites_list <- list()
  for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
    message(sample)
    csm_tmp <- CSM_list[[sample]]
    for (i in ct_forComparision){
      ct_i <- i
      cell_barcode_meta_i <- meta_data %>% 
        mutate(CellTag = rownames(.)) %>%  
        dplyr::filter(Classified_Celltype == ct_i & Sample == sample) %>%
        pull(CellTag)
      cell_barcode_csm_format_all_i <- rownames(csm_tmp) %>%
        sub("_L[0-9]+_", "_", .) %>%
        sub("_(.*)_", "_\\1.", .) %>%
        paste0(.,"-1") %>%
        sub("\\.", "#", x = .)
      cell_barcode_csm_selected_i <- rownames(csm_tmp)[cell_barcode_csm_format_all_i %in% cell_barcode_meta_i]
      mut_site_i <- retriveLocsByCells(csm_tmp, cell_barcode_csm_selected_i)$Mut
      if (length(cell_barcode_meta_i) <= 10){
        mut_site_i <- "Empty"
      }
      data_mutationCelltype_sites_list[[sample]][[ct_i]] <- mut_site_i
    }
  }
  return(data_mutationCelltype_sites_list)
}

AML_scRNA_CSM_list <- AML_RNA_CSM_list
AML_scATA_CSM_list <- AML_ATA_CSM_list

# scRNA
# AML_CSM_DX_list
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list <- lapply(AML_scRNA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("DX", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list)

# AML_CSM_REM_list
AML_scRNA_CSM_REM_list <- lapply(AML_scRNA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("REM", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scRNA_CSM_REM_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scRNA_CSM_REM_list)

# AML_CSM_REL_list
AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list <- lapply(AML_scRNA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("REL", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list)

# scATA
# AML_CSM_DX_list
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list <- lapply(AML_scATA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("DX", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list)

# AML_CSM_REM_list
AML_scATA_CSM_REM_list <- lapply(AML_scATA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("REM", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scATA_CSM_REM_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scATA_CSM_REM_list)

# AML_CSM_REL_list
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list <- lapply(AML_scATA_CSM_list, function(df) {
  df[grep("REL", rownames(df)), , drop = FALSE]
})
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list <- Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list)

HSPC <- c("HSC", "Progenitor")
Myeloid <- c("GMP", "Monocytes", "CD16.Monocytes", "cDC", "pDC")
Lymphoid <- c("CLP", "Pre.B.Cell", "B.Cell", "CD4.Naive", "CD4.Memory", "CD8.Naive", "CD8.Memory", "CD8.Effector", "NK")
Erythroid_Basophil <- c("Early.Erythrocyte", "Late.Erythrocyte")
Other <- c("Early.Basophil", "Plasma")

AML_scRNA_meta <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    maincelltype = case_when(
      Classified_Celltype %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Erythroid_Basophil ~ "Erythroid",
      Classified_Celltype %in% Other ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

AML_scATA_meta <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    maincelltype = case_when(
      predictedGroup_Un %in% HSPC ~ "HSPC",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Myeloid ~ "Myeloid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Lymphoid ~ "Lymphoid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Erythroid_Basophil ~ "Erythroid",
      predictedGroup_Un %in% Other ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

AML_scATA_meta$Classified_Celltype <- AML_scATA_meta$predictedGroup_Un

maincelltypes <- c("HSPC", "Myeloid", "Lymphoid", "Erythroid", "Other")
subcelltypes <- c(HSPC, Myeloid, Lymphoid, Erythroid_Basophil, Other)

AML_scRNA_meta_DX <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("DX", Library_ID))

AML_scRNA_meta_REL <- AML_scRNA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("REL", Library_ID))

AML_scATA_meta_DX <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("DX", Sample))

AML_scATA_meta_REL <- AML_scATA_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("REL", Sample))

AML_scRNA_meta_DX$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_DX$Classified_Celltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_REL$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_REL$Classified_Celltype, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_DX$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_DX$maincelltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_meta_REL$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scRNA_meta_REL$maincelltype, "REL", sep = "_")

AML_scATA_meta_DX$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_DX$Classified_Celltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_REL$Classified_CelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_REL$Classified_Celltype, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_DX$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_DX$maincelltype, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_meta_REL$maincelltypeQ <- paste(AML_scATA_meta_REL$maincelltype, "REL", sep = "_")

AML_scRNA_meta_DX_REL <- rbind(AML_scRNA_meta_DX, AML_scRNA_meta_REL)
AML_scATA_meta_DX_REL <- rbind(AML_scATA_meta_DX, AML_scATA_meta_REL)

# samples for lineage switching
selected_samples_id <- c("AML4","AML11", "AML16",  "AML17", "AML18", "AML24")
# scRNA
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list <- AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list[names(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list <- AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list[names(AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list <- c(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_select_list, AML_scRNA_CSM_REL_select_list)

# scATA
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list <- AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list[names(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "DX", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list <- AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list[names(AML_scATA_CSM_REL_list) %in% selected_samples_id]
names(AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list) <- paste(selected_samples_id, "REL", sep = "_")
AML_scATA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list <- c(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_select_list, AML_scATA_CSM_REL_select_list)

data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage <- get_scRNA_mutSites_byStages(AML_scRNA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list, AML_scRNA_meta_DX_REL)
data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage <- get_scATA_mutSites_byStages(AML_scATA_CSM_DX_REL_select_list, AML_scATA_meta_DX_REL)

data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list <- list()
data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list <- list()
common_sample_pairs <- selected_samples_id
common_sample_stages <- c("DX", "REL")
ct_forComparision <- subcelltypes

for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
  message(sample)
  row_col_data_Names <- c(paste(ct_forComparision, "DX", sep = "_"), paste(ct_forComparision, "REL", sep = "_"))
  mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(row_col_data_Names), 
                                                    ncol = length(row_col_data_Names)))
  rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  for (i in 1:nrow(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
    ct_stage_i <- rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[i]
    ct_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][1]
    stage_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][2]
    mut_site_i <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_i, sep = "_")]][[ct_i]]
    for (j in 1:ncol(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
      ct_stage_j <- colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[j]
      ct_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][1]
      stage_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][2]
      mut_site_j <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scRNA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_j, sep = "_")]][[ct_j]]
      similarity_score <- ifelse(
        length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) == 0,
        0,
        length(unique(intersect(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) / length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j)))
      )
      if (length(mut_site_i) == 1 | length(mut_site_j) == 1){
        similarity_score <- 0
      }
      
      mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity[i, j] <- similarity_score
    }
  }
  data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list[[sample]] <- mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity
}

for (sample in common_sample_pairs){
  message(sample)
  row_col_data_Names <- c(paste(ct_forComparision, "DX", sep = "_"), paste(ct_forComparision, "REL", sep = "_"))
  mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity <- as.data.frame(matrix(data = 0, nrow = length(row_col_data_Names), 
                                                    ncol = length(row_col_data_Names)))
  rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity) <- row_col_data_Names
  for (i in 1:nrow(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
    ct_stage_i <- rownames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[i]
    ct_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][1]
    stage_i <- strsplit(ct_stage_i, "_")[[1]][2]
    mut_site_i <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_i, sep = "_")]][[ct_i]]
    for (j in 1:ncol(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)){
      ct_stage_j <- colnames(mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity)[j]
      ct_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][1]
      stage_j <- strsplit(ct_stage_j, "_")[[1]][2]
      mut_site_j <- data_mutationCelltype_mutSites_scATA_byStage[[paste(sample, stage_j, sep = "_")]][[ct_j]]
      similarity_score <- ifelse(
        length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) == 0,
        0,
        length(unique(intersect(mut_site_i, mut_site_j))) / length(unique(c(mut_site_i, mut_site_j)))
      )
      if (length(mut_site_i) == 1 | length(mut_site_j) == 1){
        similarity_score <- 0
      }
      mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity[i, j] <- similarity_score
    }
  }
  data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list[[sample]] <- mut_cellTypeAnn_similarity
}


corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML4), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML4")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML16), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML16")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML4), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML4")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML16), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML16")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML17), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML17")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML11), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML11")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML18), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML18")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scRNA_byStage_list$AML24), order = "original", type = 'lower',
         method = 'color',  col = rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100)), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML24")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML17), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML17")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML11), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML11")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML18), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML18")

corrplot(as.matrix(data_mutationCelltype_similarity_scATA_byStage_list$AML24), order = "original", type = 'upper',
         method = 'color',  col = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100), col.lim = c(0, 1), title = "AML24")
```

# sessionInfo
```{r sessionInfo}
sessionInfo()
```
